articles.title: Robust Piezoelectricity with Spontaneous Polarization in Monolayer Tellurene and Multilayer Tellurium Film at Room Temperature for Reliable Memory
Advancing quantum imaging through learning theory
articles.title_zh: 通过学习理论推进量子成像
articles.abstract: Nature Communications, Published online: 27 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s41467-025-67884-1 Current superresolution imaging can beat the Rayleigh limit but struggles with complex imaging tasks. Here, the authors use a quantum-learning framework to address these challenges and introduce an improved method that enhances superresolution of nearby compact sources.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然通讯》，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 27 日； doi:10.1038/s41467-025-67884-1 当前的超分辨率成像可以超越瑞利极限，但难以应对复杂的成像任务。在这里，作者使用量子学习框架来应对这些挑战，并引入一种改进的方法来增强附近紧凑源的超分辨率。

articles.title: Gut microbiota-derived metabolite isovalerylcarnitine modulates salt sensitivity of blood pressure and incident hypertension: a multicenter dietary salt intervention trial
articles.title_zh: 肠道微生物群衍生的代谢物异戊酰肉碱调节血压和高血压的盐敏感性：一项多中心膳食盐干预试验
articles.abstract: Nature Communications, Published online: 26 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s41467-025-67513-x Here, combining data from a clinical trial and animal models, the authors show a role for a gut-acylcarnitine axis in the development of salt-sensitive hypertension, and identify isovalerylcarnitine as a key microbiota-derived modulator and potential target for the precision prevention of hypertension.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然通讯》，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 26 日； doi:10.1038/s41467-025-67513-x 在此，作者结合临床试验和动物模型的数据，展示了肠酰基肉碱轴在盐敏感性高血压发展中的作用，并将异戊酰肉碱确定为关键的微生物群衍生调节剂和精准预防高血压的潜在靶点。

articles.title: Exciton transport driven by spin excitations in an antiferromagnet
articles.title_zh: 反铁磁体中由自旋激发驱动的激子输运
articles.abstract: Nature Nanotechnology, Published online: 26 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s41565-025-02068-y Exciton propagation in CrSBr is strongly influenced by magnetic properties, particularly peaking at the Néel temperature. Its transport is not governed by classical diffusion but rather by an interaction with the spin degree of freedom, specifically through a magnon–exciton drag effect.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然纳米技术》，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 26 日； doi:10.1038/s41565-025-02068-y CrSBr 中的激子传播受到磁性的强烈影响，特别是在尼尔温度下达到峰值。它的输运不受经典扩散的控制，而是受到与自旋自由度的相互作用的控制，特别是通过磁振子-激子阻力效应。

articles.title: Detecting the hidden magnetism of altermagnets
articles.title_zh: 检测交流磁体隐藏的磁性
articles.abstract: Altermagnets are a newly recognized class of antiferromagnets whose magnetic structure behaves very differently from what is found in conventional systems. In conventional antiferromagnets, the sublattices are linked by simple inversion or translation, resulting in spin-degenerate electronic bands. In altermagnets, however, they are connected by unconventional symmetries such as rotations or screw axes. This shift in symmetry breaks the spin degeneracy, allowing for spin-polarized electron currents even in the absence of net magnetization.
articles.abstract_zh: 交变磁体是一类新近被认可的反铁磁体，其磁结构的行为与传统系统中的磁结构非常不同。在传统的反铁磁体中，子晶格通过简单的反转或平移连接起来，从而产生自旋简并电子带。然而，在交流磁体中，它们通过非常规对称性（例如旋转或螺旋轴）连接。这种对称性的转变打破了自旋简并性，即使在没有净磁化强度的情况下也允许自旋极化电子流。

articles.title: Motion of magnetic vortex rings subject to Hall effect
articles.title_zh: 霍尔效应下磁涡环的运动
articles.abstract: Author(s): Yasuhide Fukumoto, Satoshi Oshiro, and Taxpulat Ruzi Streamlines of an exact solution of the Hall-MHD equation for a spherical vortex containing toroidal magnetic flux, wrapped by a vortex sheet. The magnetic tension acts to accelerate the traveling speed of a spherical vortex. The Hall effect, originating from relative fluctuations of electrons and ions, provides further acceleration. Besides, a singular solution specific to Hall-MHD is found for the spherical vortex, which vanishes when the Hall effect is switched off. [Phys. Rev. Fluids 10, 124703] Published Wed Dec 24, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Yasuhide Fukumoto、Satoshi Oshiro 和 Taxpulat Ruzi 包含环形磁通量且由涡流片包裹的球形涡流的 Hall-MHD 方程精确解的流线。磁张力的作用是加速球形涡流的行进速度。源自电子和离子的相对波动的霍尔效应提供了进一步的加速。此外，针对球形涡流找到了霍尔 MHD 特有的奇异解，当霍尔效应关闭时，球形涡流就会消失。 [物理。 Rev. Fluids 10, 124703] 2025 年 12 月 24 日星期三发布
authors: Yasuhide Fukumoto, Satoshi Oshiro, and Taxpulat Ruzi

articles.title: Magnetic phase diagram of ${\mathrm{ErB}}_{4}$ as explored by neutron scattering
articles.title_zh: 通过中子散射探索的 ${\mathrm{ErB}}_{4}$ 磁相图
articles.abstract: Author(s): Simon Flury, Wolfgang J. Simeth, Danielle R. Yahne, Manisha Islam, Igor Plokhikh, Daniel G. Mazzone, Eric D. Bauer, Priscila F. S. Rosa, Romain Sibille, Oksana Zaharko, Dariusz J. Gawryluk, and Marc Janoschek Here, the authors combine single-crystal neutron diffraction and neutron spectroscopy to study the magnetic phase diagram and the crystal electric field spectrum of the 4 f -electron intermetallic ErB 4 . They reveal that the characteristic, field-induced half-plateau phase in this Ising-like system adopts an up-up-up-down structure. These findings shed light on the balance of the underlying exchange interactions between the magnetic moments arranged on a Shastry-Sutherland lattice. [Phys. Rev. articles.title: On entropy driven spin crossover in pristine and fluorinated Fe(phenanthroline) 2 (NCS) 2 : Insight from DFT
articles.title_zh: 关于原始和氟化 Fe(菲咯啉) 2 (NCS) 2 中熵驱动的自旋交叉：来自 DFT 的见解
articles.abstract: An ab initio total energy calculation of the Fe(phenanthroline) 2 (NCS) 2 (Fephen) molecule adsorbed on a copper surface revealed that substituting hydrogen with fluorine in the spin-crossover Fephen molecule drastically alters its electronic structure, leading to an inversion of its magnetic state. To understand the temperature-dependent physics of spin crossover, various vibrational modes were computed within the quasi-harmonic approximation using a finite-difference method. The analysis showed that the primary frequency differences between the high-spin (HS) and low-spin states are concentrated in the N–C–S and Fe–ligand stretching modes for both the pristine and fluorinated molecules. This observation aligns well with expectations, as these specific bonds are directly involved and most impacted by the spin-crossover phenomenon. Free energy calculations indicated that the pristine Fephen molecule undergoes a spin crossover at 167 K, which closely matches the experimental value of 175 K. In contrast, the fluorinated Fephen molecule does not exhibit any spin crossover, with its HS state remaining the most stable across all temperatures. These calculated frequencies were also instrumental in determining the evolution of the HS fraction with respect to temperature in the pristine molecule, utilizing the Slichter–Drickamer model. The results from this model showed good agreement with experimental observations, further validating this approach.
articles.abstract_zh: 对吸附在铜表面上的 Fe(菲咯啉) 2 (NCS) 2 (Fephen) 分子的从头计算总能量表明，用氟取代自旋交叉 Fephen 分子中的氢会极大地改变其电子结构，导致其磁态反转。为了理解自旋交叉的温度相关物理现象，使用有限差分法在准谐波近似内计算了各种振动模式。分析表明，原始分子和氟化分子的高自旋（HS）和低自旋态之间的主要频率差异集中在 N-C-S 和 Fe-配体拉伸模式中。这一观察结果与预期非常吻合，因为这些特定的键直接涉及自旋交叉现象，并且受自旋交叉现象的影响最大。自由能计算表明，原始 Fephen 分子在 167 K 时发生自旋交叉，这与 175 K 的实验值非常吻合。相比之下，氟化 Fephen 分子没有表现出任何自旋交叉，其 HS 态在所有温度下保持最稳定。这些计算出的频率也有助于利用 Slichter-Drickamer 模型确定原始分子中 HS 分数相对于温度的演变。该模型的结果与实验观察结果吻合良好，进一步验证了该方法。
articles.journal: The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue

articles.title: Stochastic representation of time-evolving neural network-based wavefunctions
articles.title_zh: 基于时间演化神经网络的波函数的随机表示
articles.abstract: Solving the time-dependent Schrödinger equation (TDSE) is pivotal for modeling nonadiabatic electron dynamics, a key process in ultrafast spectroscopy and laser–matter interactions. However, exact solutions to the TDSE remain computationally prohibitive for most realistic systems, as the Hilbert space expands exponentially with dimensionality. In this work, we propose an approach integrating the stochastic representation framework with a neural network wavefunction ansatz, a flexible model capable of approximating time-evolving quantum wavefunctions. We first validate the method on one-dimensional, single-electron systems, focusing on ionization dynamics under intense laser fields, a critical process in attosecond physics. Our results demonstrate that the approach accurately reproduces key features of quantum evolution, including the energy and dipole evolution during ionization. We further show the feasibility of extending this approach to three-dimensional systems. Due to the increased complexity of real-time simulations in higher dimensions, these results remain at an early stage and highlight the need for more advanced stabilization strategies.
articles.abstract_zh: 求解瞬态薛定谔方程 (TDSE) 对于非绝热电子动力学建模至关重要，而非绝热电子动力学是超快光谱和激光与物质相互作用的关键过程。然而，对于大多数现实系统来说，TDSE 的精确解在计算上仍然令人望而却步，因为希尔伯特空间随维数呈指数级扩展。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种将随机表示框架与神经网络波函数 ansatz 集成的方法，神经网络波函数 ansatz 是一种能够逼近时间演化量子波函数的灵活模型。我们首先在一维单电子系统上验证该方法，重点关注强激光场下的电离动力学，这是阿秒物理学的一个关键过程。我们的结果表明，该方法准确地再现了量子演化的关键特征，包括电离过程中的能量和偶极子演化。我们进一步展示了将这种方法扩展到三维系统的可行性。由于更高维度的实时模拟的复杂性增加，这些结果仍处于早期阶段，凸显了对更先进的稳定策略的需求。

articles.title: Chemical Upcycling of Nitrile Butadiene Rubbers to Polyamines and Polyols by Chemoselective Catalytic Hydrogenation
articles.title_zh: 通过化学选择性催化加氢将丁腈橡胶化学升级为聚胺和多元醇
articles.abstract: We report here two new approaches for the chemical recycling/upcycling of nitrile butadiene rubber (NBR) to make either polyamines or polyols. Both processes are achieved through ruthenium-catalysed hydrogenation reactions, where the chemoselective reduction of nitriles leads to the formation of either amines or alcohols. The hydrogenation of NBR to polyamines could be achieved at temperatures as low as 35 °C, whereas a higher temperature (150 °C) was required for the formation of polyols with catalytic turnover numbers reaching up to 2000. Additionally, polyamines were demonstrated for their potential application in CO2 capture, absorbing 1.34 mmol of CO2/g of absorbents. This was significantly higher in comparison to that obtained in the case of NBR, which adsorbed only 0.015 mmol of CO2/g of absorbent. The synthesised polyol exhibited a markedly greater ductility than the commercial NBR, reaching an elongation at break of ≈ 550 % versus ≈ 420 % for NBR, suggestive of potential use in stretch-demanding applications.
articles.abstract_zh: 我们在此报告两种丁腈橡胶 (NBR) 化学回收/升级循环以制造聚胺或多元醇的新方法。这两个过程都是通过钌催化的氢化反应实现的，其中腈的化学选择性还原导致胺或醇的形成。 NBR 氢化成聚胺可以在低至 35 °C 的温度下实现，而形成多元醇则需要更高的温度（150 °C），催化转化数高达 2000。此外，聚胺在 CO2 捕集方面的潜在应用也得到了证明，每克吸收剂吸收 1.34 mmol CO2。这明显高于 NBR 的情况，NBR 每克吸收剂仅吸附 0.015 mmol CO2。合成的多元醇表现出比商用 NBR 明显更高的延展性，断裂伸长率达到约 550%，而 NBR 约为 420%，这表明其在拉伸要求较高的应用中具有潜在用途。

articles.title: Porous Polymers for Generating Slow Relaxing Hyperpolarization under Benchtop-DNP conditions.
articles.title_zh: 用于在台式 DNP 条件下产生慢弛豫超极化的多孔聚合物。
articles.abstract: Dissolution dynamic nuclear polarization (dDNP) is a hyperpolarization method providing orders-of-magnitude sensitivity boost for liquid state nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) and magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) experiments. We recently introduced a new hyperpolarization strategy based on DNP at 1 T and 77 K (instead of 7 T and 1.2 K) and demonstrated two-orders-of-magnitude signal enhancements with a compact and affordable benchtop instrumentation, designed to enable repeated hyperpolarization cycles for multi-scan NMR experiments. However, as in conventional dDNP, the required presence of paramagnetic polarizing agents for DNP is a major roadblock to melt the sample without dilution. The introduction of hyperpolarizing porous polymer (HYPOP) matrices achieved the paradoxical goal of generating fast polarization while preserving long relaxation times within the matrix. This breakthrough enabled the generation of transportable hyperpolarization for dDNP. In this study, we evaluate HYPOP under benchtop DNP conditions, demonstrating their ability to minimize paramagnetic relaxation effects before and after dilution-free melting, a key step in our benchtop DNP workflow. We report 1H signal enhancement factors exceeding 45, and 13C polarization lifetimes over 50 seconds at 77 K, and 18 seconds at 298 K, while the sample remains impregnated in the matrix. This represents a key milestone toward non-destructive melt DNP for replenishable hyperpolarized solution-state NMR.
articles.abstract_zh: 溶解动态核极化 (dDNP) 是一种超极化方法，可为液态核磁共振 (NMR) 和磁共振成像 (MRI) 实验提供数量级的灵敏度提升。我们最近推出了一种基于 1 T 和 77 K（而不是 7 T 和 1.2 K）DNP 的新超极化策略，并通过紧凑且经济实惠的台式仪器演示了两个数量级的信号增强，旨在实现多扫描 NMR 实验的重复超极化循环。然而，与传统的 dDNP 一样，DNP 所需的顺磁极化剂的存在是在不稀释的情况下熔化样品的主要障碍。超极化多孔聚合物（HYPOP）基质的引入实现了产生快速极化同时在基质内保持长弛豫时间的矛盾目标。这一突破使得 dDNP 能够产生可传输的超极化。在本研究中，我们在台式 DNP 条件下评估 HYPOP，证明它们能够在免稀释熔化前后最大限度地减少顺磁弛豫效应，这是我们台式 DNP 工作流程的关键步骤。我们报告 1H 信号增强因子超过 45，13C 极化寿命在 77 K 下超过 50 秒，在 298 K 下超过 18 秒，同时样品仍然浸渍在基质中。这代表了可补充超极化溶液态 NMR 无损熔体 DNP 的一个重要里程碑。

articles.title: DAISY: simple simulation of spin dynamics in nanoscale magnets
articles.title_zh: DAISY：纳米级磁体中自旋动力学的简单模拟
articles.abstract: We present DAISY, a web-based computational tool for the simulation of dynamic magnetic properties of single molecule magnets and supermagnetic nanoparticles. The tool is parametric and accepts relaxation parameters of different mechanisms, including Orbach, Raman, Quantum Tunneling of the Magnetization and the direct relaxation process. The dynamic magnetic response in presence of an oscillating (ac) magnetic field can be simulated, as well as magnetic hysteresis due to a magnetic field sweep between two limits and a simple magnetization relaxation in presence of a static magnetic field. This allows verifying whether the parameters extracted from ac magnetometry or magnetization relaxation are adequate to simulate magnetic hysteresis or other processes have to be considered to properly describe the system of interest. Calculations are inexpensive and typically take a few seconds, whether online or on a local computer, allowing a frugal approach to modelling of magnetic dynamics. We showcase DAISY with a dysprosium bis(amide)–alkene complex which was recently shown to present magnetic hysteresis up to T = 100 K, and find that the parameter sets extracted from ac fits cannot fully reproduce magnetic hysteresis experiments. We offer some paths forward.
articles.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 DAISY，一种基于网络的计算工具，用于模拟单分子磁体和超磁性纳米颗粒的动态磁特性。该工具是参数化的，接受不同机制的弛豫参数，包括奥尔巴赫、拉曼、磁化的量子隧道和直接弛豫过程。可以模拟存在振荡（交流）磁场时的动态磁响应，以及由于两个极限之间的磁场扫描而产生的磁滞以及存在静态磁场时的简单磁化弛豫。这允许验证从交流磁力测量或磁化弛豫中提取的参数是否足以模拟磁滞或必须考虑其他过程以正确描述感兴趣的系统。无论是在线还是在本地计算机上，计算成本低廉，通常只需几秒钟，从而可以采用节俭的方法来建模磁动力学。我们展示了带有镝双（酰胺）-烯烃复合物的 DAISY，该复合物最近被证明可呈现高达 T = 100 K 的磁滞现象，并发现从交流拟合中提取的参数集无法完全重现磁滞实验。我们提供了一些前进的道路。

articles.title: Solution-Tunable Interfacial Interaction Landscape Governs Anomalous Nanoparticle Diffusion in Liquid-Phase Electron Microscopy
articles.title_zh: 溶液可调界面相互作用景观控制液相电子显微镜中的异常纳米颗粒扩散
articles.abstract: Understanding how nanoparticles move near liquid-solid interfaces is central to nanoscale transport in catalysis, biology, and soft materials. Here, we uncover the physical mechanisms governing anomalous surface diffusion of PEG-coated gold nanorods (AuNRs) near the silicon nitride (SiNx) membrane in liquid-phase transmission electron microscopy (LPTEM). By systematically tuning the ionic environment (H2O, 5mM H2SO4, 1.5mM NaCl, 5mM PBS), we show how electrostatic screening and ion-specific surface interactions modulate the interaction landscape, altering the strength and abundance of binding sites that govern confinement and mobility of nanoparticles. Statistical analyses and deep learning classification of particle trajectories reveal a tunable transition between fractional Brownian motion (FBM) in strongly interacting systems (H2O, H2SO4) and annealed transient time motion (ATTM) in screened environments (NaCl, PBS). These results establish electrostatic screening and specific ion effects as external controls that program near-surface transport, shifting the diffusion mechanism from FBM to ATTM and tuning the particle mobility. To further elucidate the interfacial dynamics, we introduce a passive nanorheology framework in LPTEM, modeling the near-surface environment of FBM-classified conditions as an effective viscoelastic medium. Leveraging translational and rotational trajectories as nanoscale rheological probes, we reconstruct frequency-dependent viscoelastic moduli to extract relaxation times and elastic-to-viscous crossover moduli that report on interaction strength at the SiNx interface. Together, these advances provide both control and diagnosis of interfacial mechanical response in LPTEM, positioning it as a quantitative tool for probing nanoscale transport in complex soft-matter and interfacial systems.
articles.abstract_zh: 了解纳米粒子如何在液-固界面附近移动对于催化、生物学和软材料中的纳米级传输至关重要。在这里，我们揭示了液相透射电子显微镜 (LPTEM) 中氮化硅 (SiNx) 膜附近 PEG 涂层金纳米棒 (AuNR) 异常表面扩散的物理机制。通过系统地调节离子环境（H2O、5mM H2SO4、1.5mM NaCl、5mM PBS），我们展示了静电屏蔽和离子特异性表面相互作用如何调节相互作用景观，改变控制纳米粒子的限制和迁移性的结合位点的强度和丰度。粒子轨迹的统计分析和深度学习分类揭示了强相互作用系统（H2O、H2SO4）中的分数布朗运动（FBM）与筛选环境（NaCl、PBS）中的退火瞬态时间运动（ATTM）之间的可调转变。这些结果建立了静电屏蔽和特定离​​子效应作为外部控制，对近表面传输进行编程，将扩散机制从 FBM 转变为 ATTM 并调整粒子迁移率。为了进一步阐明界面动力学，我们在 LPTEM 中引入了被动纳米流变学框架，将 FBM 分类条件的近地表环境建模为有效的粘弹性介质。利用平移和旋转轨迹作为纳米级流变探针，我们重建了频率相关的粘弹性模量，以提取弛豫时间和弹性到粘性交叉模量，以报告 SiNx 界面处的相互作用强度。总之，这些进步提供了 LPTEM 中界面机械响应的控制和诊断，将其定位为探测复杂软物质和界面系统中纳米级输运的定量工具。

articles.title: Life-Cycle Assessment of Solid Calcium-Looping Direct Air Capture and Its Synergistic Dual Use for Net-Negative Cement
articles.title_zh: 固体钙环直接空气捕获的生命周期评估及其对净负水泥的协同双重用途
articles.abstract: Calcium-looping direct air carbon capture and storage (DACCS) is a mature technology positioned for gigatonne-scale carbon dioxide removal (CDR). However, a holistic assessment of its system-wide environmental performance and large-scale implications remains critically absent. Here, we present a prospective life cycle assessment (LCA) of megatonne-scale calcium-looping DACCS systems under projected 2050 energy scenarios, evaluating CO2 removal alongside 18 other environmental impact categories. Our analysis confirms the high potential of calcium-looping DACCS, demonstrating net removal efficiencies ranging from 85% to 96% by 2050. Net removal of 1 GtCO2 increases other environmental impacts by under 2% of the global safe operating space in most scenarios. Environmental hotspots, including particulate matter formation, aquatic eutrophication, and freshwater ecotoxicity, are primarily dominated by the energy supply chain. We then demonstrate the substantial potential for the synergistic integration of calcium-looping DACCS with cement production, leveraging the dual-use of limestone as both a DAC sorbent and a cement feedstock. This integration offers dual benefits for CDR and industrial decarbonization. By cycling the CaCO3 sorbent once through the DAC unit before its calcination in the cement kiln, the integrated system achieves net-negative cement production with a final footprint of approximately -0.15tCO2 per tonne of cement. Subsequent sorbent cycles further reduce this footprint. These findings position calcium-looping DACCS not only as a competitive CDR pathway but also as a powerful solution for decarbonizing hard-to-abate sectors, offering a clear path toward achieving net-zero and net-negative cement production.
articles.abstract_zh: 钙循环直接空气碳捕获和储存（DACCS）是一项成熟的技术，适用于十亿吨规模的二氧化碳去除（CDR）。然而，对其全系统环境绩效和大规模影响的整体评估仍然严重缺乏。在这里，我们提出了在预计的 2050 年能源情景下对百万吨级钙循环 DACCS 系统的前瞻性生命周期评估 (LCA)，评估二氧化碳去除量以及其他 18 个环境影响类别。我们的分析证实了钙循环 DACCS 的巨大潜力，到 2050 年净去除效率将达到 85% 至 96%。在大多数情况下，净去除 1 GtCO2 会使其他环境影响增加不到 2% 的全球安全操作空间。环境热点，包括颗粒物形成、水生富营养化和淡水生态毒性，主要由能源供应链主导。然后，我们利用石灰石作为 DAC 吸附剂和水泥原料的双重用途，展示了钙环 DACCS 与水泥生产协同整合的巨大潜力。这种整合为 CDR 和工业脱碳提供了双重好处。通过在水泥窑中煅烧之前将 CaCO3 吸附剂循环通过 DAC 装置一次，集成系统实现了净负水泥生产，每吨水泥的最终足迹约为 -0.15tCO2。随后的吸附剂循环进一步减少了这种足迹。这些发现使钙循环 DACCS 不仅成为一种有竞争力的 CDR 途径，而且成为难以减排行业脱碳的强大解决方案，为实现净零和净负水泥生产提供了明确的途径。

articles.title: Impact of 2’-fluoro nucleobase modifications on CD detection, sensitivity and specificity of short oligonucleotides bound to alginate hydrogels
articles.title_zh: 2'-氟核碱基修饰对结合藻酸盐水凝胶的短寡核苷酸的 CD 检测、灵敏度和特异性的影响
articles.abstract: Chemical modification of oligonucleotides has aided in the advancement of various therapeutic applications; however, their impact on biosensor performance remains understudied. As demand grows for rapid, sensitive, and portable detection technologies in healthcare, environmental, and forensic fields, leveraging the effects of chemical modifications with spectroscopic detection methods offers an opportunity to improve biosensor performance. Herein, we synthesize label-free oligonucleotide-bound alginate hydrogels as biosensors and use circular dichroism (CD) spectroscopy to detect and confirm DNA and RNA hybridization without amplification or labelling. We particularly focus on the impact of 2’-fluoro modifications on biosensor sensitivity and specificity. Fluorine-modified DNA-based biosensors demonstrate more than a threefold increase in sensitivity compared to unmodified DNA. RNA-based biosensors displayed a similar trend, where 2’-fluoro nucleobase modifications significantly lowered the LOD. Biosensor specificity is evaluated by adding mixtures containing up to four non-complementary strands to the alginate-oligo hydrogels. Fluorine-modified biosensors consistently demonstrated greater specificity with more distinct shifts in CD spectra compared to unmodified DNA. Principal component analysis was applied to differentiated samples with and without a bound complement. Additionally, when thermal melt data was combined with CD spectral data it was possible with a random forest model to predict whether unknown samples demonstrated complement binding, with accuracies of 95 % and 83% for 2’-F modified and unmodified oligos, respectively. Our findings highlight the enhancement in biosensor sensitivity and specificity conferred by 2’-fluoro modifications, demonstrating their potential for improved label-free, amplification-free detection of oligonucleotides in complex environmental and forensic samples.
articles.abstract_zh: 寡核苷酸的化学修饰有助于各种治疗应用的进步；然而，它们对生物传感器性能的影响仍未得到充分研究。随着医疗保健、环境和法医学领域对快速、灵敏和便携式检测技术的需求不断增长，通过光谱检测方法利用化学修饰的影响为提高生物传感器性能提供了机会。在此，我们合成了无标记的寡核苷酸结合藻酸盐水凝胶作为生物传感器，并使用圆二色性（CD）光谱来检测和确认DNA和RNA杂交，而无需扩增或标记。我们特别关注 2’-氟修饰对生物传感器灵敏度和特异性的影响。与未修饰的 DNA 相比，氟修饰的 DNA 生物传感器的灵敏度提高了三倍以上。基于 RNA 的生物传感器也显示出类似的趋势，其中 2'-氟核碱基修饰显着降低了 LOD。通过向藻酸盐寡聚水凝胶中添加最多含有四个非互补链的混合物来评估生物传感器的特异性。与未修饰的 DNA 相比，氟修饰的生物传感器始终表现出更高的特异性，CD 光谱的变化更明显。主成分分析适用于具有和不具有结合补体的差异化样品。此外，当热熔数据与 CD 光谱数据相结合时，可以使用随机森林模型来预测未知样品是否表现出补体结合，2’-F 修饰和未修饰寡核苷酸的准确度分别为 95% 和 83%。我们的研究结果强调了 2'-氟修饰赋予生物传感器灵敏度和特异性的增强，证明了它们在复杂环境和法医样品中改进无标记、无扩增寡核苷酸检测的潜力。

articles.title: Structural Characterization of a Desolvated Flexible Porous Coordination Polymer Using MicroED
articles.title_zh: 使用 MicroED 对脱溶剂的柔性多孔配位聚合物进行结构表征
articles.abstract: Flexible porous coordination polymers (PCPs) and metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) that undergo structural changes upon guest removal/uptake have a wide range of potential applications. However, detailed characterization of the guest removal/uptake promoted changes of these materials is frequently limited by the occurrence of crystal fragmentation which produces nanocrystals that are unsuitable for single-crystal X-ray diffraction analysis. An example of this limitation was encountered in our recent study of the flexible PCP [Cu(CF 3 SO 3 ) 2 (bpp) 2 ] (bpp = 1,3-bis(4-pyridyl)propane), which we demonstrated can exist in two PCP polymorphs: the one-dimensional form 1 obtained by removal of guest acetone molecules from the one-dimensional acetone-inclusion form [Cu(CF 3 SO 3 )(bpp) 2 ]·CF 3 SO 3 ·2acetone ( 1 ·2acetone) and the two-dimensional form 2 obtained by removal of guest water molecules from the two-dimensional water-inclusion form [Cu(CF 3 SO 3 ) 2 (bpp) 2 ]·H 2 O ( 2 ·H 2 O). Although we speculated that adsorption/desorption of H 2 O by 2 occurs in conjunction with a transient interlayer expansion process, confirmatory evidence could not be obtained because the crystal structure of the desolvated form 2 could not be determined and, therefore, a comparison of the structures in the presence and absence of guests was not possible. In the current study, we employed the microcrystal electron diffraction (MicroED) technique to elucidate the local and overall structural changes associated with guest H 2 O removal/uptake by 2 . Comparative analysis of these structures shows that H 2 O guests in 2 ·H 2 O are trapped in isolated pores and that all bpp ligands in the H 2 O incorporated form exist in the TT ( T = trans ) conformation. On the other hand, the dehydrated form 2 possesses a more densely packed structure with smaller discrete cavities and that conformations of the bpp ligands in 2 are partially converted from TT to TG ( G = gauche ). The results of the structural analysis and theoretical calculations show that a drastic transient structural change involving interlayer expansion/shrinkage and/or continuous partial deformation of the framework of 2 takes place during H 2 O adsorption/desorption. In addition, observations made in temperature-dependent powder X-ray diffraction and H 2 O adsorption/desorption experiments reveal that H 2 O guests present in 2 ·H 2 O interact with the CF 3 SO 3 anions in the framework via moderate hydrogen bonds.
articles.abstract_zh: 柔性多孔配位聚合物（PCP）和金属有机框架（MOF）在客体去除/吸收时发生结构变化，具有广泛的潜在应用。然而，这些材料的客体去除/吸收促进变化的详细表征常常受到晶体碎裂的发生的限制，晶体碎裂产生不适合单晶X射线衍射分析的纳米晶体。我们最近对柔性 PCP [Cu(CF 3 SO 3 ) 2 (bpp) 2 ] (bpp = 1,3-bis(4-pyridyl)propane) 的研究遇到了这种限制的一个例子，我们证明它可以存在于两种 PCP 多晶型物中：通过从一维丙酮包合物形式 [Cu(CF 3 SO 3 )(bpp) 2 中去除客体丙酮分子获得一维形式 1 ]·CF 3 SO 3 ·2丙酮( 1·2丙酮)和通过从二维水包合物形式[Cu(CF 3 SO 3 ) 2 (bpp) 2 ]·H 2 O(2·H 2 O)中除去客体水分子而获得的二维形式2。尽管我们推测2对H 2 O的吸附/解吸与瞬时层间膨胀过程一起发生，但由于无法确定去溶剂化形式2的晶体结构，因此无法获得证实的证据，因此无法比较客体存在和不存在的情况下的结构。在当前的研究中，我们采用微晶电子衍射 (MicroED) 技术来阐明与客体 H 2 O 去除/吸收 2 相关的局部和整体结构变化。这些结构的比较分析表明，2·H 2 O中的H 2 O客体被捕获在孤立的孔中，并且所有H 2 O掺入形式的bpp配体都以TT（T=反式）构象存在。另一方面，脱水形式 2 具有更密集的结构和更小的离散空腔，并且 2 中的 bpp 配体构象部分从 TT 转变为 TG（G = gauche）。结构分析和理论计算的结果表明，在H 2 O吸附/解吸过程中，会发生剧烈的瞬态结构变化，包括层间膨胀/收缩和/或2的骨架的连续部分变形。此外，温度依赖性粉末X射线衍射和H 2 O吸附/解吸实验的观察表明，2·H 2 O中存在的H 2 O客体与骨架中的CF 3 SO 3 阴离子通过适度的氢键相互作用。

articles.title: RxnNet: An AI Framework for Reaction Mechanism Discovery - A Case Study of Carbocations
articles.title_zh: RxnNet：用于发现反应机制的人工智能框架 - 碳阳离子案例研究
articles.abstract: Understanding complex chemical reaction cascades remains a major challenge in chemistry. Scalable investigation of their thermodynamic and kinetic properties requires the use of automated reaction prediction tools, which is a rapidly growing area in the study of chemical reactivity. However, the systematic exploration of intricate reaction networks involving highly reactive intermediates continues to pose significant difficulties. Here, we introduce RxnNet, a novel artificial intelligence-assisted platform for the automated prediction of chemical reaction mechanisms. RxnNet integrates heuristic rules with domain-specific chemical knowledge including stereochemistry, regiochemistry, conformational preferences, and isotope labeling, to construct mechanistically informed reaction networks. These networks are represented as graphs and are coupled with on-the-fly quantum chemical evaluations to identify all feasible intermediates and transition states. In this work, we apply RxnNet to carbocation chemistry, a notoriously complex and computationally demanding type of reaction. We demonstrate the method’s capabilities by analyzing three multistep reactions with known mechanisms, each of which poses significant challenges even for expert computational and synthetic chemists. RxnNet provides a robust approach for uncovering reaction mechanisms, which can accelerate the understanding and design of transformations in complex chemical systems.
articles.abstract_zh: 了解复杂的化学反应级联仍然是化学领域的一项重大挑战。对它们的热力学和动力学性质的可扩展研究需要使用自动反应预测工具，这是化学反应性研究中快速增长的领域。然而，涉及高活性中间体的复杂反应网络的系统探索仍然面临重大困难。在这里，我们介绍 RxnNet，这是一种新颖的人工智能辅助平台，用于自动预测化学反应机理。 RxnNet 将启发式规则与特定领域的化学知识（包括立体化学、区域化学、构象偏好和同位素标记）相结合，以构建机械知情的反应网络。这些网络以图表的形式表示，并与动态量子化学评估相结合，以识别所有可行的中间体和过渡态。在这项工作中，我们将 RxnNet 应用到碳正离子化学中，这是一种众所周知的复杂且计算要求高的反应类型。我们通过分析具有已知机制的三个多步骤反应来展示该方法的功能，每个反应甚至对专家计算和合成化学家来说都构成了重大挑战。 RxnNet 提供了一种揭示反应机制的强大方法，可以加速对复杂化学系统中转化的理解和设计。

articles.title: Chemical Reactivity Mapping: Exploring Chemical Reaction based on Digitalization of Small Molecules through Mayr’s Parameter
articles.title_zh: 化学反应图谱：通过迈尔参数探索基于小分子数字化的化学反应
articles.abstract: A new strategy for exploring novel reactions, utilizing Mayr’s reactivity parameters, is developed. We create a highly accurate prediction model of reactivity parameters using machine learning. Validating the reactivity scales in the reactions of isoquinoline and predicting the reactivity in commercially available chemicals lead to a new approach for exploring chemical reactions. Incorporating Mayr's reactivity parameters in both chemical reactivity mapping and chemical reaction space contributes to expedite the exploitation of reactions in small molecule syntheses.
articles.abstract_zh: 开发了一种利用迈尔反应参数探索新反应的新策略。我们使用机器学习创建了高度准确的反应参数预测模型。验证异喹啉反应的反应性规模并预测市售化学品的反应性，为探索化学反应提供了一种新方法。将迈尔的反应参数纳入化学反应映射和化学反应空间有助于加快小分子合成中反应的利用。
authors: Elisa Margarita Mendoza Zamarripa, MENDOZA ZAMARRIPA

articles.title: Native Top-Down Mass Spectrometry combined with High-Resolution Charge Variant Analysis of Trastuzumab Originator and Biosimilars
articles.title_zh: 天然自上而下质谱法与曲妥珠单抗原研药和生物仿制药的高分辨率电荷变体分析相结合
articles.abstract: Comprehensive characterisation of monoclonal antibody (mAb) charge heterogeneity is essential for ensuring product quality, maintaining batch consistency, and supporting biosimilar development. Charge variant analysis (CVA) is widely used to separate acidic and basic proteoforms from the main species. However, cation-exchange chromatography coupled to mass spectrometry provides limited information and cannot localise the post-translational modifications (PTMs) responsible for mAb heterogeneity. Here, we present the coupling of pH-gradient CVA with native top-down mass spectrometry (TD-MS) for proteoform-specific analysis of trastuzumab. Individual charge variants were chromatographically separated under native conditions and directly fragmented on the chromatographic timescale using higher-energy collision dissociation (HCD), electron-transfer dissociation (ETD), and ultraviolet photodissociation (UVPD). The addition of proton-transfer charge reduction (PTCR) helped to reduce spectral congestion and enhanced the detection of high-mass fragment ions, resulting in improved sequence coverage. This workflow enabled the complete sequencing of complementarity-determining region (CDR) 3 and the direct identification and insights on the location of key PTMs at the intact-protein level, including deamidation, succinimide, and N-terminal pyroGlu, on individual proteoforms. Comparison of five trastuzumab samples (originator and biosimilars) demonstrated high reproducibility in fragmentation patterns, sequence coverage, and variant assignment, highlighting the robustness of the method. Although limitations remain due to the challenges of fragmentating intact mAbs under native conditions, this work establishes a proof of concept for CVA native TD-MS characterisation of mAbs to complement bottom-up and middle-down analyses and has potential for broad applicability on antibody-based biopharmaceuticals, from characterisation to biosimilarity evaluation.
articles.abstract_zh: 单克隆抗体 (mAb) 电荷异质性的全面表征对于确保产品质量、保持批次一致性和支持生物仿制药开发至关重要。电荷变体分析 (CVA) 广泛用于从主要物种中分离酸性和碱性蛋白质形式。然而，阳离子交换色谱与质谱联用提供的信息有限，并且无法定位导致 mAb 异质性的翻译后修饰 (PTM)。在这里，我们提出了 pH 梯度 CVA 与天然自上而下质谱 (TD-MS) 的耦合，用于曲妥珠单抗的蛋白质形式特异性分析。在自然条件下对各个电荷变体进行色谱分离，并使用高能碰撞解离 (HCD)、电子转移解离 (ETD) 和紫外光解离 (UVPD) 在色谱时间尺度上直接裂解。质子转移电荷减少 (PTCR) 的添加有助于减少光谱拥塞并增强对高质量碎片离子的检测，从而提高序列覆盖率。该工作流程能够对互补决定区 (CDR) 3 进行完整测序，并在完整蛋白质水平上直接识别和了解关键 PTM 的位置，包括单个蛋白质形式上的脱酰胺、琥珀酰亚胺和 N 末端 PyroGlu。五个曲妥珠单抗样品（原研药和生物仿制药）的比较证明了片段模式、序列覆盖和变异分配的高重现性，突出了该方法的稳健性。尽管由于在天然条件下破碎完整 mAb 的挑战仍然存在局限性，但这项工作为 mAb 的 CVA 天然 TD-MS 表征建立了概念验证，以补充自下而上和自中而下的分析，并且具有在基于抗体的生物制药上从表征到生物相似性评估的广泛适用性的潜力。

articles.title: High-sensitivity MAM to support early-stage activities during biotherapeutic development
articles.title_zh: 高灵敏度 MAM 支持生物治疗开发过程中的早期活动
articles.abstract: During early-stage biotherapeutic development, analytical methods play an important role in candidate screening, process development, formulation screening and stability determination. However, developing sensitive and robust analytical methods is challenging in the early stages as there is often insufficient product knowledge and limited sample amount. Here we present a high-sensitivity multi-attribute method (MAM) centred on nano-flow LC-MS/MS for the characterisation of mAb-based molecules. Using NISTmAb as a reference, run-to-run variation was examined, in terms of peak area, peak width, peak asymmetry, retention time precision, and mass accuracy. The ability to detect and quantify commonly observed product quality attributes (PQAs) was also evaluated for a wide range of injected digest amounts from 1 ng to 100 ng. LOD and LOQ were between 0.6 to 7.0 ng of injected protein amount (R² > 0.99), for a selection of low abundant PQAs including deamidation, oxidation, succinimide, and lysine content, following regulatory considerations on the implementation of MAM in QC. The nano-flow MAM approach was then applied as an in-process test to study PQAs and impurities of a chimeric IgG1 mAb. Low amounts of samples were digested followed by high resolution nano-LC-MS, Orbitrap-based mass detection, operated within a Code of Federal Regulations (CFR) Part 11 compliant data system for data acquisition and data analysis. Finally, the new peak detection (NPD) aspect of the method was also evaluated, as an in-process test for detection of low-level impurities. The results highlight the potential of nano-flow MAM for early-stage process development and its suitability for QC applications.
articles.abstract_zh: 在生物治疗的早期开发过程中，分析方法在候选药物筛选、工艺开发、制剂筛选和稳定性测定中发挥着重要作用。然而，开发灵敏且稳健的分析方法在早期阶段具有挑战性，因为产品知识往往不足且样品量有限。在这里，我们提出了一种以纳流 LC-MS/MS 为中心的高灵敏度多属性方法 (MAM)，用于表征基于 mAb 的分子。使用 NISTmAb 作为参考，检查了运行间的峰面积、峰宽度、峰不对称性、保留时间精度和质量准确度方面的变化。还针对 1 ng 至 100 ng 的各种注射消化物量评估了检测和量化常见产品质量属性 (PQA) 的能力。根据对 QC 中 MAM 实施的监管考虑，对于一系列低丰度 PQA，包括脱酰胺、氧化、琥珀酰亚胺和赖氨酸含量，LOD 和 LOQ 的注入蛋白量为 0.6 至 7.0 ng（R² > 0.99）。然后将纳流 MAM 方法用作过程测试，以研究嵌合 IgG1 mAb 的 PQA 和杂质。消化少量样品，然后进行高分辨率纳米 LC-MS、基于 Orbitrap 的质量检测，在符合联邦法规 (CFR) 第 11 部分的数据系统内进行数据采集和数据分析。最后，还评估了该方法的新峰检测 (NPD) 方面，作为检测低含量杂质的过程中测试。结果凸显了纳流 MAM 在早期工艺开发中的潜力及其对 QC 应用的适用性。

articles.title: Detailed chemical kinetic studies of Perindropril Erbumine and correlating the electron transfer reaction through computational chemistry approach.
articles.title_zh: 通过计算化学方法对培哚普利艾丁胺进行详细的化学动力学研究并关联电子转移反应。
articles.abstract: This study explores the electrochemical properties of Perindopril Erbumine (PE) via cyclic voltammetry (CV) and their relationship to electronic structure, assessed through HOMO energies computed using ORCA simulations. CV experiments, conducted with a three-electrode system (glassy carbon working electrode, Ag/AgCl reference, Pt counter), revealed distinct oxidation and reduction peaks, which were correlated with HOMO and LUMO energies to probe drug’s redox behavior. The effects of scan rate (10–100 mV/s) on peak oxidation current and the reversibility of the reaction were also investigated. Computational results from ORCA (B3LYP/6-31G(d,p)) yielded a HOMO energy of -6.048eV, -6.243eV, -6.715eV. These findings validate the use of combined electrochemical and computational methods to elucidate PE’s redox properties, offering insights into its stability and potential biological interactions.
articles.abstract_zh: 本研究通过循环伏安法 (CV) 探索培哚普利艾丁胺 (PE) 的电化学特性及其与电子结构的关系，并通过 ORCA 模拟计算的 HOMO 能量进行评估。使用三电极系统（玻碳工作电极、Ag/AgCl 参比电极、Pt 计数器）进行的 CV 实验揭示了明显的氧化和还原峰，这些峰与 HOMO 和 LUMO 能量相关，以探测药物的氧化还原行为。还研究了扫描速率（10-100 mV/s）对峰值氧化电流和反应可逆性的影响。 ORCA (B3LYP/6-31G(d,p)) 的计算结果得出 HOMO 能量为 -6.048eV、-6.243eV、-6.715eV。这些发现验证了使用电化学和计算相结合的方法来阐明 PE 的氧化还原特性，从而深入了解其稳定性和潜在的生物相互作用。

articles.title: Field-induced anomaly in the anisotropic non-Fermi-liquid normal state of ${\mathrm{UBe}}_{13}$
articles.title_zh: ${\mathrm{UBe}}_{13}$ 各向异性非费米液体正常状态下场引起的异常
articles.abstract: Author(s): Yusei Shimizu, Shunichiro Kittaka, Yohei Kono, Shota Nakamura, Yoshinori Haga, Etsuji Yamamoto, Kazushige Machida, Hiroshi Amitsuka, and Toshiro Sakakibara The heavy-fermion superconductor UBe 13 , emerging from an extremely correlated non-Fermi liquid state, remains a compelling candidate for spin-triplet superconductivity. Using single-crystal and very low-temperature thermodynamic probes, the authors report here an unusual superconducting and normal-state phase diagram, with anomalies due to anisotropic Fermi surface reconstruction. Moreover, high-resolution magnetization measurements uncover a hidden fifth-order magnetic susceptibility that reveals an unexpected interplay between multipolar effects and Fermi surface reconstruction in this compound. These findings provide new insights into spin-triplet pairing in enigmatic 5 f electron systems. [Phys. Rev. B 112, 245157] Published Tue Dec 23, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Yusei Shimizu、Shunichiro Kittaka、Yohei Kono、Shota Nakamura、Yoshinori Haga、Etsuji Yamamoto、Kazushige Machida、Hiroshi Amitsuka 和 Toshiro Sakakibara 从高度相关的非费米液态中产生的重费米子超导体 UBe 13 仍然是自旋三重态超导性的有力候选者。作者使用单晶和极低温热力学探针，在这里报告了一个不寻常的超导和正常状态相图，其中由于各向异性费米表面重建而出现异常。此外，高分辨率磁化强度测量揭示了隐藏的五阶磁化率，揭示了该化合物中多极效应与费米表面重建之间意想不到的相互作用。这些发现为神秘的 5 f 电子系统中的自旋三重态配对提供了新的见解。 [物理。 Rev. B 112, 245157] 2025 年 12 月 23 日星期二发布
authors: Yusei Shimizu, Shunichiro Kittaka, Yohei Kono, Shota Nakamura, Yoshinori Haga, Etsuji Yamamoto, Kazushige Machida, Hiroshi Amitsuka, and Toshiro Sakakibara
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Phys. Rev. B

articles.title: Why a chiral magnet is a direction-dependent street for electrons
articles.title_zh: 为什么手性磁体是电子的方向依赖街道
articles.abstract: RIKEN physicists have discovered for the first time why the magnitude of the electron flow depends on direction in a special kind of magnet. This finding could help to realize future low-energy devices.
articles.abstract_zh: RIKEN物理学家首次发现为什么电子流的大小取决于特殊磁铁的方向。这一发现可能有助于实现未来的低能耗设备。

articles.title: Diverse carbon units in high-pressure C–K system predicted from first-principles and machine-learning methods
articles.title_zh: 根据第一性原理和机器学习方法预测高压C-K系统中的多种碳单元
articles.abstract: Metal–carbon compounds are significant for their diverse carbon units, which exhibit distinctive electronic and bonding properties, and broad application potential. In this article, we present a detailed C–K phase diagram, constructed using the crystal structure prediction method, MAGUS, based on machine-learning potentials fitted from first-principles calculations, revealing diverse carbon units, from allylenide ions to graphene-like two-dimensional layers. We found that the Pnma C 12 K 16 phase contains allylenide ions, which contribute to its insulating behavior. Meanwhile, the ambient-pressure stable Cmcm C 12 K 4 phase contains potassium-intercalated carbon layers with unique pentagonal–hexagonal–heptagonal (5–6–7) carbon rings, which we term “σ-graphene.” This σ-graphene monolayer can be synthesized either by exfoliating bulk C 12 K 4 using an electrochemical method or by removing potassium atoms via evaporating. Furthermore, Boltzmann transport calculations show that pristine σ-graphene exhibits a high electrical conductivity (∼5.5 × 10 7 S/m at 300 K), comparable with silver and copper, making it a promising material for electrical transport applications. In addition, σ-graphene demonstrates excellent adsorption capabilities for O 2 and NO 2 , with adsorption energies of −0.503 and −0.528 eV, respectively, suggesting potential applications in catalysis and environmental monitoring. Our work highlights the C–K system as a versatile platform for synthesizing and applying novel carbon-based materials.
articles.abstract_zh: 金属碳化合物因其多样化的碳单元而具有重要意义，这些碳单元表现出独特的电子和键合特性以及广泛的应用潜力。在本文中，我们提出了详细的 C-K 相图，该图是使用晶体结构预测方法 MAGUS 构建的，基于第一性原理计算拟合的机器学习势，揭示了从烯丙基离子到类石墨烯二维层的各种碳单元。我们发现 Pnma C 12 K 16 相含有烯丙基离子，这有助于其绝缘行为。同时，常压稳定的Cmcm C 12 K 4 相含有钾插层碳层，具有独特的五边形-六边形-七边形（5-6-7）碳环，我们称之为“σ-石墨烯”。这种σ-石墨烯单层可以通过使用电化学方法剥离块体C 12 K 4 或通过蒸发去除钾原子来合成。此外，玻尔兹曼输运计算表明，原始σ-石墨烯表现出高电导率（300 K 时约为 5.5 × 10 7 S/m），与银和铜相当，使其成为电输运应用的有前途的材料。此外，σ-石墨烯对O 2 和NO 2 表现出优异的吸附能力，吸附能分别为-0.503和-0.528 eV，这表明其在催化和环境监测方面具有潜在的应用前景。我们的工作强调 C-K 系统作为合成和应用新型碳基材料的多功能平台。
articles.journal: The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue

articles.title: Complex-energy second-order approximate coupled-cluster methods for electronic resonances
articles.title_zh: 电子共振的复能量二阶近似耦合簇方法
articles.abstract: Electronic resonances are metastable states with finite lifetimes, encountered in processes such as photodetachment, electron transmission spectroscopy, and Auger decay. Resonances appear in Hermitian quantum mechanics as increased density of states in the continuum rather than as discrete energy levels. To describe resonances accurately, including their coupling to the continuum, methods based on non-Hermitian quantum mechanics can be used, which yield complex energies. In this study, we combine the complex absorbing potential and complex basis functions techniques with the RI-CC2 method. The second-order coupled cluster method (CC2) offers a good balance between accuracy and computational cost by approximating equation-of-motion coupled-cluster singles and doubles (EOM-CCSD) theory, making it suitable for studying electronic resonances in larger molecules. The resolution-of-the-identity (RI) approximation further reduces computational demands without significant loss in accuracy. We investigate the numerical performance of the new complex-energy RI-CC2 methods, focusing on temporary anions. Negative electron affinities and decay widths can be computed using the electron-attachment (EA) variant of RI-CC2. For N 2 , C 2 H 4 , CH 2 O, and HCOOH, EA-CC2 yields electron affinities about 0.1–0.2 eV smaller than EOM-EA-CCSD, while deviations reach 0.5 eV for larger anions such as uracil, naphthalene, cyanonaphthalene, and pyrene. As a result of these trends, EA-CC2 is in better agreement with experiment for the negative electron affinities than EOM-EA-CCSD for all studied anions. The corresponding resonance widths from EA-CC2 calculations are about 0.05–0.25 eV smaller compared to EOM-EA-CCSD. Semi-empirical spin-scaling increases electron affinities by 0.3–0.5 eV and broadens resonance widths, improving the agreement with EOM-EA-CCSD but worsening the agreement with experiment.
articles.abstract_zh: 电子共振是具有有限寿命的亚稳态，在光脱离、电子透射光谱和俄歇衰变等过程中会遇到。在厄米量子力学中，共振表现为连续体中状态密度的增加，而不是离散的能级。为了准确地描述共振，包括它们与连续体的耦合，可以使用基于非厄米量子力学的方法，该方法产生复杂的能量。在本研究中，我们将复吸收势和复基函数技术与 RI-CC2 方法相结合。二阶耦合团簇方法 (CC2) 通过近似运动方程耦合团簇单数和双数 (EOM-CCSD) 理论，在精度和计算成本之间提供了良好的平衡，使其适合研究较大分子中的电子共振。身份分辨率 (RI) 近似进一步降低了计算需求，而不会显着降低准确性。我们研究了新的复能 RI-CC2 方法的数值性能，重点关注临时阴离子。负电子亲和力和衰变宽度可以使用 RI-CC2 的电子附着 (EA) 变体来计算。对于 N 2 、C 2 H 4 、CH 2 O 和 HCOOH，EA-CC2 产生的电子亲和势比 EOM-EA-CCSD 小约 0.1-0.2 eV，而对于较大的阴离子（例如尿嘧啶、萘、氰萘和芘），偏差达到 0.5 eV。由于这些趋势，对于所有研究的阴离子，EA-CC2 与负电子亲和势的实验结果比 EOM-EA-CCSD 更好。与 EOM-EA-CCSD 相比，EA-CC2 计算得出的相应共振宽度大约小 0.05–0.25 eV。半经验自旋缩放将电子亲和势增加了 0.3-0.5 eV，并拓宽了共振宽度，改善了与 EOM-EA-CCSD 的一致性，但恶化了与实验的一致性。
articles.journal: The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue

articles.title: State-to-state dynamics of P( 2 D) + H 2 (X 1 Σ g + ) reactions based on the new neural network potential energy surface
articles.title_zh: 基于新神经网络势能面的P( 2 D) + H 2 (X 1 Σ g + ) 反应的状态动力学
articles.abstract: To investigate the state-to-state dynamics of the P(D2) + H2(XΣg+1)( v = 0, j = 0) reaction, we reconstructed the PH 2 (X 2 B 1 ) potential energy surface (PES) using the permutation invariant polynomial neural network (PIP-NN) method based on 40 595 ab initio points. The aug-cc-pV Q Z basis sets with Davidson correction were employed throughout the calculations. The reference wave function for the multi-reference configuration interaction calculations was constructed from a full valence complete-active-space self-consistent field wave function. To achieve higher PES accuracy, the double many-body expansion–scaled external correlation (DMBE–SEC) method was applied to extrapolate to the one-electron complete basis set limit, yielding a total root-mean square deviation of 2.4 meV for the final NN-PES. Based on the refined PH 2 (X 2 B 1 ) NN-PES, geometries, energies, and harmonic frequencies of stationary points were obtained and analyzed in detail, showing excellent agreement with other theoretical results. Subsequently, quantum time-dependent wave packet (TDWP) and quasi-classical trajectory (QCT) methods were utilized to compute reaction probability, integral cross section (ICS), differential cross section (DCS), product rovibrational distribution, and rate constant on the developed NN-PES. The TDWP results reveal rich resonant structures, while the QCT calculations provide a qualitatively correct description of the coarse-grained reaction cross sections. These results also demonstrate a threshold-type microscopic reaction mechanism characterized by dominant forward–backward scattering, attributable to long-lived collision complex formation. Collectively, these findings provide fundamental mechanistic insights into the microscopic reaction mechanism and dynamics of phosphorus chemistry in interstellar environments.
articles.abstract_zh: 为了研究 P(D2) + H2(XΣg+1)( v = 0, j = 0) 反应的状态动态，我们使用基于 40 595 个从头点的排列不变多项式神经网络 (PIP-NN) 方法重建了 PH 2 (X 2 B 1 ) 势能面 (PES)。整个计算过程中均采用带有戴维森校正的 aug-cc-pV Q Z 基组。用于多参考构型相互作用计算的参考波函数是由全价完整活性空间自洽场波函数构造的。为了获得更高的 PES 精度，采用双多体展开尺度外相关 (DMBE-SEC) 方法外推至单电子完全基组极限，最终 NN-PES 的总均方根偏差为 2.4 meV。基于精化的PH 2 (X 2 B 1 ) NN-PES，获得并详细分析了驻点的几何形状、能量和谐波频率，与其他理论结果表现出良好的一致性。随后，利用量子时间相关波包（TDWP）和准经典轨迹（QCT）方法来计算所开发的 NN-PES 上的反应概率、积分截面（ICS）、微分截面（DCS）、产物振动分布和速率常数。 TDWP 结果揭示了丰富的共振结构，而 QCT 计算提供了粗粒度反应截面的定性正确描述。这些结果还证明了一种阈值型微观反应机制，其特征是主要的前向-后向散射，归因于长寿命的碰撞复合物的形成。总的来说，这些发现为星际环境中磷化学的微观反应机制和动力学提供了基本的机制见解。
articles.journal: The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue

articles.title: Submersion of sodium clusters in helium nanodroplets and critical assessment of He–He pseudopotentials
articles.title_zh: 钠簇浸没在氦纳米液滴中以及 He-He 赝势的关键评估
articles.abstract: The submersion of neutral sodium clusters Na n ( n = 10, 20, 30) in He N ( N ≲ 90 000) is investigated by zero-point averaged dynamics (ZPAD) simulations, the quantum nature of helium atoms being taken into account through the use of He–He pseudopotentials. Na n clusters are described by tight-binding models; their initial structures are taken from the Quantum Cluster Database, locally optimized, and compared with structures predicted by popular density functionals in order to confirm their suitability. Helium nanodroplets (HNDs) are formed by successive coalescences of smaller droplets, a process that may excite a HND vibrational mode with no influence on the propensity of Na n for submersion in helium. Interestingly, Na 20 is found to possibly rearrange at the HND surface at the early times of Na 20 He 79989 dynamics, a behavior absent from other calculations. Three He–He pseudopotentials were mainly tested. Simulations based on the two shallowest pseudopotentials yield swift submersion of Na n ( t < 100 ps) at all n investigated here, in disagreement with experiments that predict that submersion should be a slow process occurring when n ≳ 21. The submersion dynamics of Na n is slower with the third and deepest pseudopotential, but calculations up to 250 ps did not enable us to identify a critical size n c ≈ 20 for submersion. We believe that ZPAD can help model the submersion of alkali clusters in HNDs of experimental size in a reasonable amount of time, provided that some effort is made to build He–He pseudopotentials more specific to submersion and large HNDs.
articles.abstract_zh: 通过零点平均动力学 (ZPAD) 模拟研究了中性钠簇 Na n ( n = 10, 20, 30) 在 He N ( N ≲ 90 000) 中的浸没，通过使用 He-He 赝势考虑了氦原子的量子性质。 Na n 簇由紧束缚模型描述；它们的初始结构取自量子簇数据库，进行局部优化，并与流行的密度泛函预测的结构进行比较，以确认它们的适用性。氦纳米液滴 (HND) 是由较小液滴连续聚结而成，这一过程可能会激发 HND 振动模式，但不会影响 Na 浸入氦气中的倾向。有趣的是，Na 20 被发现可能在 Na 20 He 79989 动力学的早期在 HND 表面重排，这是其他计算中没有的行为。主要测试了三种 He-He 赝势。基于两个最浅赝势的模拟在此处研究的所有 n 处产生了 Na n (t < 100 ps) 的快速浸没，这与预测当 n ≳ 21 时浸没应该是一个缓慢过程的实验不一致。第三个也是最深的赝势中 Na n 的浸没动力学较慢，但高达 250 ps 的计算使我们无法确定浸没的临界尺寸 n c ≈ 20。我们相信，ZPAD 可以帮助在合理的时间内模拟实验大小的 HND 中碱金属团簇的浸没，前提是努力建立更适合浸没和大型 HND 的 He-He 赝势。
articles.journal: The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue

articles.title: Maximizing Machine Learning Interatomic Potential Transferability for the Discovery of the Novel Stellated Octadecagon Bi18-Pt24 Cage Structure
articles.title_zh: 最大化机器学习原子间势可转移性以发现新型星形十八边形 Bi18-Pt24 笼结构
articles.abstract: Achieving true transferability remains the central challenge for Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials (ML-IAPs) in modeling complex bimetallic nanoclusters across their vast potential energy surfaces. We systematically investi- gate data selection strategies to optimize the Chebyshev Interaction Model for Efficient Simulation (ChIMES) po- tential for the Bi-Pt nanoclusters by comparing three innovative sampling methods: Principal Component Analysis (PCA)/k-means (structural diversity), t-distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding (t-SNE)/k-means (force-space di- versity), and hierarchical clustering. Quantitatively, the PCA/k-means strategy proved most effective for global ac- curacy, yielding the lowest force errors and achieving energy root mean square errors (RMSE) values competitive with DFT, demonstrating excellent accuracy (19.16 meV/atom). Structural validation on 34 unique DFT-optimized isomers further confirmed the potential’s high fidelity, with the best model PCA/k-means reproducing structures with an average root mean square deviation (RMSD) of 0.10 Å. However, the t-SNE methods, by maximizing diversity in the force space, demonstrated superior extrapolative power, leading to the more precise prediction of a novel stel- lated octadecagon Bi18Pt24 cage structure, demonstrating the potential for exploring previously unseen morphologies. Our results establish a clear methodology for strategic data sampling that successfully maximizes ML-IAP transfer- ability, providing an accurate and computationally efficient tool that accelerates the theoretical discovery of complex bimetallic architectures.
articles.abstract_zh: 实现真正的可转移性仍然是机器学习原子间势（ML-IAP）在跨越其巨大势能表面对复杂双金属纳米团簇进行建模时面临的核心挑战。我们系统地研究了数据选择策略，通过比较三种创新的采样方法：主成分分析（PCA）/k-means（结构多样性）、t-分布随机邻域嵌入（t-SNE）/k-means（力空间多样性）和层次聚类，优化Bi-Pt纳米团簇的切比雪夫高效模拟相互作用模型（ChIMES）潜力。从定量角度来看，PCA/k-means 策略被证明对于全局精度最有效，产生最低的力误差，并实现与 DFT 竞争的能量均方根误差 (RMSE) 值，表现出出色的精度 (19.16 meV/atom)。对 34 种独特的 DFT 优化异构体的结构验证进一步证实了该潜力的高保真度，最佳模型 PCA/k 均值再现的结构平均均方根偏差 (RMSD) 为 0.10 Å。然而，t-SNE 方法通过最大化力空间的多样性，表现出卓越的外推能力，从而可以更精确地预测新型星形十八边形 Bi18Pt24 笼结构，展示了探索以前未见过的形态的潜力。我们的研究结果建立了一种清晰的战略数据采样方法，可成功地最大化 ML-IAP 可转移性，提供准确且计算高效的工具，加速复杂双金属架构的理论发现。

articles.title: Structure--Dynamics--Property Relationship Reveals the Origin of Porous Integrity in Covalent Organic Frameworks
articles.title_zh: 结构-动力学-性质关系揭示了共价有机框架中多孔完整性的起源
articles.abstract: Flexibility encoded in low-frequency lattice dynamics has been shown to be effective at understanding various properties of porous materials, especially metal--organic frameworks, but remains largely unexplored in structurally similar covalent organic frameworks~(COFs). Here, we establish a structure--dynamics--property relationship for two COFs by combining three-dimensional electron diffraction, low-frequency vibrational spectroscopy, and first-principles calculations. Using 3D electron diffraction, we determine, for the first time, the crystal structure of the closed-pore reduced framework COF-300-AR, revealing a bent linker conformation. Terahertz and low-frequency Raman spectroscopy, together with solid-state DFT and local mode analysis, are then used to resolve the low-frequency lattice dynamics of COF-300 and closed-pore COF-300-AR and to quantify linker flexibility in terms of imine/amine torsions. Normal mode decomposition and torsional potential energy surfaces show that these torsions are roughly twice as stiff in \h\ as in \AR, and that the reduced framework has a shallower, multi-well torsional potential energy landscape, which permits the observed closed-pore structure. In \h, the same torsional coordinate is much stiffer, locking the structure into a porous framework. More broadly, this work demonstrates how combining advanced structure determination with low-frequency vibrational spectroscopy and first-principles calculations can identify, and subsequently tune, the coordinates that control pore opening, guest uptake, and structural integrity in flexible COFs.
articles.abstract_zh: 低频晶格动力学编码的灵活性已被证明可以有效地理解多孔材料的各种特性，特别是金属有机框架，但在结构相似的共价有机框架（COF）中仍然很大程度上未被探索。在这里，我们通过结合三维电子衍射、低频振动光谱和第一性原理计算，建立了两种COF的结构-动力学-性质关系。利用 3D 电子衍射，我们首次确定了闭孔还原框架 COF-300-AR 的晶体结构，揭示了弯曲的连接体构象。然后使用太赫兹和低频拉曼光谱以及固态 DFT 和局部模式分析来解析 COF-300 和闭孔 COF-300-AR 的低频晶格动力学，并量化亚胺/胺扭转方面的连接体灵活性。简正模态分解和扭转势能面表明，这些扭转在 \h\ 中的刚度大约是 \AR 中的两倍，并且简化的框架具有更浅的多井扭转势能景观，这允许观察到闭孔结构。在 \h 中，相同的扭转坐标更加坚硬，将结构锁定在多孔框架中。更广泛地说，这项工作展示了如何将先进的结构测定与低频振动光谱和第一原理计算相结合，可以识别并随后调整控制柔性COF中的孔开放、客体吸收和结构完整性的坐标。

articles.title: High-Performance Semiempirical Excited-State Molecular Dynamics: A Step Toward Data-Driven Photodynamics
articles.title_zh: 高性能半经验激发态分子动力学：迈向数据驱动光动力学的一步
articles.abstract: We introduce excited-state molecular dynamics (ESMD) in PYSEQM, a GPU-accelerated semiempirical quantum chemistry engine implemented in PyTorch. The new module enables Born-Oppenheimer (single-surface) dynamics using configuration-interaction singles and random phase approximation for excited-states, allowing long trajectories and large statistical ensembles to be simulated efficiently on a single GPU. We also implement an extended-Lagrangian ESMD (XL-ESMD) scheme that propagates auxiliary electronic variables, enabling relaxed ground and excited-state convergence thresholds without compromising energy conservation. The ESMD implementation scales smoothly from small chromophores to a nearly 900-atom dendrimer (taking 6.5 s per ESMD step). PYSEQM also supports batched execution, allowing many geometries or trajectories to be evaluated in a single GPU launch, substantially increasing throughput and making ensemble-based protocols routine. As a demonstration, we compute absorption, emission, and infrared spectra from trajectories propagated on the ground and first excited states, illustrating practical utility of PYSEQM. The XL-ESMD scheme yields identical spectra at significantly lower computational cost, establishing the role of extended Lagrangian based dynamics for efficient ESMD simulations. Beyond raw performance, PYSEQM’s Pytorch foundation provides automatic differentiation for forces, efficient GPU batching, and seamless interfacing with machine learning models. These capabilities position PYSEQM as practical platform for machine learning-augmented excited-state dynamics and lay the foundation for future data-driven nonadiabatic ESMD modeling of ultrafast spectroscopic probes.
articles.abstract_zh: 我们在 PYSEQM 中引入激发态分子动力学 (ESMD)，PYSEQM 是在 PyTorch 中实现的 GPU 加速的半经验量子化学引擎。新模块使用构型相互作用单元和激发态随机相位近似来实现玻恩-奥本海默（单表面）动力学，从而可以在单个 GPU 上有效地模拟长轨迹和大型统计集合。我们还实现了扩展拉格朗日 ESMD (XL-ESMD) 方案，该方案传播辅助电子变量，从而在不影响能量守恒的情况下实现宽松的基态和激发态收敛阈值。 ESMD 实现可以从小发色团平稳地扩展到近 900 个原子的树枝状聚合物（每个 ESMD 步骤需要 6.5 秒）。 PYSEQM 还支持批量执行，允许在单个 GPU 启动中评估许多几何形状或轨迹，从而大幅提高吞吐量并使基于集成的协议成为常规。作为演示，我们计算了在基态和第一激发态上传播的轨迹的吸收、发射和红外光谱，说明了 PYSEQM 的实际用途。 XL-ESMD 方案以显着降低的计算成本产生相同的光谱，建立了基于扩展拉格朗日动力学的有效 ESMD 模拟的作用。除了原始性能之外，PYSEQM 的 Pytorch 基础还提供力的自动微分、高效的 GPU 批处理以及与机器学习模型的无缝接口。这些功能使 PYSEQM 成为机器学习增强激发态动力学的实用平台，并为未来数据驱动的超快光谱探针非绝热 ESMD 建模奠定基础。

articles.title: On the Thermodynamic Consequences of Geometric Partitioning and Network Topology on Categorical Completion Mechanisms:Derivation of Catalytic Effect and Specificity from Geometric Aperture Selection Without Information Processing
articles.title_zh: 论几何分区和网络拓扑对分类完成机制的热力学后果：从无需信息处理的几何孔径选择中推导出催化效应和特异性
articles.abstract: A framework for catalysis based on categorical aperture selection rather than temporal acceleration is presented. Traditional catalysis theory describes catalysts as agents that accelerate reactions by lowering activation energies, implicitly treating time as the fundamental variable and reaction rate enhancement as temporal compression. This temporal interpretation generates three fundamental contradictions. First, the instantaneous concentration paradox: if catalysts accelerate reactions proportionally to substrate availability, arbitrarily high substrate concentrations should yield instantaneous reaction rates, yet Michaelis-Menten kinetics demonstrates finite maximum velocity V_max independent of substrate concentration. Second, the reversible reaction paradox: catalysts accelerate reversible reactions without altering equilibrium constants, requiring simultaneous bidirectional temporal acceleration, which is physically incoherent. Third, the step-exclusion paradox: catalyzed reactions proceed through different intermediates than uncatalyzed reactions, implying catalysts either execute the same steps faster, requiring an energy source for acceleration, or skip steps entirely, rendering those steps unnecessary yet present in uncatalyzed pathways. These contradictions are resolved by reformulating catalysis as geometric selection through categorical apertures, defined as topological structures in phase-lock network space that permit molecular passage based on configurational compatibility rather than kinetic properties. Categorical apertures operate through structural recognition without information acquisition: the aperture-substrate interaction involves zero Shannon information processing and therefore incurs no Landauer erasure cost, distinguishing categorical selection fundamentally from Maxwell's demon mechanisms that require measurement, decision, and memory erasure. The framework is formalised through three mathematical structures: categorical distance metrics d_C(C_i, C_j) quantifying topological separation between configurational states in phase-lock network space, phase-lock network topology G = (V, E) encoding molecular interaction patterns through nodes representing molecular configurations and edges representing phase-coherent couplings, and topological completion conditions C_i < C_j defining accessibility relations between categorical states based on network connectivity rather than energy barriers.Analysis of serine protease catalytic triads reveals that the Ser-His-Asp arrangement creates a categorical aperture through precise geometric alignment of the nucleophile, proton shuttle, and electrostatic stabilizer, with the aperture's selectivity arising from topological constraints rather than from activation energy reduction. Carbonic anhydrase, conventionally described as achieving near-diffusion-limited rates through maximal temporal acceleration, is reinterpreted as possessing an optimal geometric aperture structure: the zinc-coordinated hydroxide nucleophile and His64 proton shuttle create minimal categorical distance d_C between substrate and product states, with the turnover number k_cat approximately 10^6 per second reflecting geometric optimality rather than temporal speed. The Haber process demonstrates categorical pathway creation: iron catalyst surfaces provide adsorption sites that transform the categorically inaccessible gas-phase N2 dissociation pathway (requiring simultaneous triple-bond cleavage) into a sequence of categorically accessible surface-mediated steps (sequential N-N bond weakening through surface coordination), reducing categorical distance from d_C much greater than 1 to d_C approximately 1 without altering the thermodynamic driving force. Ribulose-1,5-bisphosphate carboxylase/oxygenase (Rubisco), widely characterized as inefficient due to low turnover number k_cat approximately 3 per second, is shown to operate in a categorically complex space: the enzyme must discriminate between CO2 and O2 substrates with near-identical geometric and electronic properties while executing a multi-step enolisation-carboxylation-hydration sequence, yielding high categorical distance d_C that cannot be reduced without sacrificing substrate specificity.
articles.abstract_zh: 提出了基于分类孔径选择而不是时间加速的催化框架。传统催化理论将催化剂描述为通过降低活化能来加速反应的试剂，隐含地将时间视为基本变量，将反应速率的提高视为时间压缩。这种时间解释产生了三个基本矛盾。首先，瞬时浓度悖论：如果催化剂与底物可用性成比例地加速反应，则任意高的底物浓度应产生瞬时反应速率，但米氏动力学表明有限的最大速度 V_max 与底物浓度无关。其次，可逆反应悖论：催化剂在不改变平衡常数的情况下加速可逆反应，需要同时双向时间加速，这在物理上是不相干的。第三，步骤排除悖论：催化反应通过与非催化反应不同的中间体进行，这意味着催化剂要么更快地执行相同的步骤，需要能源来加速，要么完全跳过步骤，使这些步骤不必要但存在于非催化途径中。这些矛盾通过将催化重新表述为通过分类孔径的几何选择来解决，分类孔径定义为锁相网络空间中的拓扑结构，允许基于构型兼容性而不是动力学特性的分子通过。分类孔径通过结构识别进行操作，无需信息获取：孔径-基底相互作用涉及零香农信息处理，因此不会产生兰道尔擦除成本，从根本上将分类选择与需要测量、决策和记忆擦除的麦克斯韦恶魔机制区分开来。该框架通过三个数学结构形式化：分类距离度量 d_C(C_i, C_j) 量化锁相网络空间中配置状态之间的拓扑分离，锁相网络拓扑 G = (V, E) 通过代表分子配置的节点和代表相相干耦合的边编码分子相互作用模式，以及拓扑完成条件 C_i < C_j 基于网络连接而不是能量障碍定义分类状态之间的可达性关系。丝氨酸蛋白酶催化分析Triads揭示了Ser-His-Asp排列通过亲核试剂、质子穿梭机和静电稳定剂的精确几何排列创建了绝对孔径，孔径的选择性来自拓扑约束而不是来自活化能减少。碳酸酐酶通常被描述为通过最大时间加速度实现接近扩散极限的速率，但被重新解释为拥有最佳几何孔径结构：锌配位的氢氧化物亲核试剂和 His64 质子穿梭在底物和产物状态之间创建最小分类距离 d_C，周转数 k_cat 约为每秒 10^6 反映几何最优性而不是时​​间速度。 Haber 过程展示了分类路径的创建：铁催化剂表面提供的吸附位点将绝对不可访问的气相 N2 解离路径（需要同时三键裂解）转化为一系列绝对可访问的表面介导步骤（通过表面配位连续削弱 N-N 键），将分类距离从远大于 1 的 d_C 减小到约 1 的 d_C，而不改变热力学驱动力。 Ribulose-1,5-二磷酸羧化酶/加氧酶 (Rubisco) 因周转数 k_cat 约为每秒 3 次而被广泛认为是低效的，它在分类复杂的空间中运行：该酶必须区分具有几乎相同的几何和电子特性的 CO2 和 O2 底物，同时执行多步烯醇化 - 羧化 - 水合序列，产生高分类距离 d_C，如果不降低该距离就无法减小牺牲底物特异性。

articles.title: Cluster-Graph Fingerprinting: A Framework for Quantitative Analysis of Machine-Learned Interatomic Model Training and Simulation Data
articles.title_zh: 聚类图指纹：机器学习原子间模型训练和模拟数据定量分析的框架
articles.abstract: We present a new method for fingerprint- ing atomic configurations relevant to ML-IAM training and application, utilizing the ChIMES descriptor. These fingerprints enable rigor- ous analysis of statistical distinguishability be- tween configurations. Sample applications in- clude assessing diversity within ML-IAP train- ing datasets, monitoring structural equilibra- tion during simulations, and automating the monitoring of ML-IAM active learning work- flows. Ultimately, these fingerprints can be de- ployed in tasks aimed at enhancing ML-IAM robustness and reliability, such as automated training dataset curation, active learning, and uncertainty quantification.
articles.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种利用 ChIMES 描述符对与 ML-IAM 训练和应用相关的原子配置进行指纹识别的新方法。这些指纹可以对配置之间的统计可区分性进行严格分析。示例应用程序包括评估 ML-IAP 训练数据集中的多样性、在模拟过程中监控结构平衡以及自动监控 ML-IAM 主动学习工作流程。最终，这些指纹可以部署在旨在增强 ML-IAM 稳健性和可靠性的任务中，例如自动训练数据集管理、主动学习和不确定性量化。

articles.title: Integration of Computational and Experimental Techniques for the Discovery of SARS-CoV-2 PLpro Covalent Inhibitors
articles.title_zh: 整合计算和实验技术来发现 SARS-CoV-2 PLpro 共价抑制剂
articles.abstract: Papain-like protease (PLpro) and 3-chymotrypsin-like protease (3CLpro or Mpro) are viral enzymes essential for the replication of SARS-CoV-2, the virus causing COVID-19 infection. While 3CLpro has been the main target of many potential antivirals including nirmatrelvir (active ingredient of Paxlovid), PLpro has proven to be more challenging to target and only a handful of inhibitors have been disclosed. However, PLpro inhibitors would enrich the therapeutic arsenal against COVID-19 resistant strains to 3CLpro inhibitors and in future coronavirus pandemics. Combining our experience with 3CLpro covalent inhibitors with our expertise in structure-based covalent drug discovery, we rationally designed PLpro inhibitors achieving a maximum potency (IC50) of 13 µM through fusion of GRL-0617 and VIR-251 PLpro inhibitors. In parallel, we launched an integrated large scale virtual screening/experimental approach, identifying four novel chemical series active at micromolar concentrations against PLpro. We report herein our investigations including rational design, virtual screening, synthesis of selected structures and in vitro assays leading to novel PLpro inhibitors. Surprisingly, these two very distinct approaches led to similar structures.
articles.abstract_zh: 木瓜蛋白酶 (PLpro) 和 3-胰凝乳蛋白酶 (3CLpro 或 Mpro) 是 SARS-CoV-2（引起 COVID-19 感染的病毒）复制所必需的病毒酶。虽然 3CLpro 一直是包括 nirmatrelvir（Paxlovid 的活性成分）在内的许多潜在抗病毒药物的主要靶点，但 PLpro 已被证明更具挑战性，并且仅公开了少数抑制剂。然而，PLpro 抑制剂将丰富针对 3CLpro 抑制剂和未来冠状病毒大流行的 COVID-19 耐药菌株的治疗库。结合我们在 3CLpro 共价抑制剂方面的经验和基于结构的共价药物发现的专业知识，我们合理设计了 PLpro 抑制剂，通过 GRL-0617 和 VIR-251 PLpro 抑制剂的融合，实现了 13 µM 的最大效力 (IC50)。与此同时，我们推出了一种集成的大规模虚拟筛选/实验方法，确定了四种在微摩尔浓度下对 PLpro 具有活性的新型化学系列。我们在此报告我们的研究，包括合理设计、虚拟筛选、选定结构的合成以及导致新型 PLpro 抑制剂的体外测定。令人惊讶的是，这两种截然不同的方法产生了相似的结构。

articles.title: An Interpretative Charge-Transfer Framework for Molecules Adsorbed on Graphene Inspired by the van Arkel–Ketelaar Diagram
articles.title_zh: 受范阿克尔-凯特拉图启发，石墨烯上吸附分子的解释性电荷转移框架
articles.abstract: An interpretive graphical framework is presented for rationalizing charge-transfer phenomena at molecule–graphene interfaces. Inspired by the classical van Arkel–Ketelaar diagram, the model unifies n- and p-doping pathways within a single representation by explicitly distinguishing between integer charge transfer (ICT) and partial charge transfer (PCT). By mapping the mean frontier-orbital energy and the molecular energy gap onto a triangular coordinate space, the framework provides a compact visualization of the energetic conditions that govern charge transfer, conditions typically dispersed across multiple band–orbital diagrams constructed separately for each adsorbate–adsorbent pair. This single-diagram approach enables the qualitative interpretation of a virtually limitless number of energetic scenarios, initially considering ideal physicochemical conditions. It is further shown that the graphical topology is preserved under non-ideal interface effects, including vacuum-level offsets, interfacial dipoles, structural defects, and finite temperature, which highlights the robustness and broad applicability of the model. Beyond its conceptual value, the framework fulfills a didactic role by offering an intuitive tool for teaching and learning topics related to solid-state chemistry, surface chemistry, interfacial phenomena, doping mechanisms, adsorption, and interfacial charge transfer.
articles.abstract_zh: 提出了一个解释性图形框架，用于合理化分子-石墨烯界面的电荷转移现象。受经典 van Arkel-Ketelaar 图的启发，该模型通过明确区分整数电荷转移 (ICT) 和部分电荷转移 (PCT)，将 n 和 p 掺杂路径统一在单一表示中。通过将平均前沿轨道能量和分子能隙映射到三角坐标空间上，该框架提供了控制电荷转移的能量条件的紧凑可视化，这些条件通常分散在为每个吸附物-吸附剂对单独构建的多个带轨道图上。这种单图方法能够对几乎无限数量的能量场景进行定性解释，最初考虑理想的物理化学条件。进一步表明，在非理想界面效应（包括真空级偏移、界面偶极子、结构缺陷和有限温度）下，图形拓扑得以保留，这凸显了该模型的鲁棒性和广泛适用性。除了其概念价值之外，该框架还通过为与固态化学、表面化学、界面现象、掺杂机制、吸附和界面电荷转移相关的教学主题提供直观的工具来发挥教学作用。

articles.title: Molecular Dynamics of a Cavity Type Water Hexamer Anion at Low Temperatures
articles.title_zh: 低温下空腔型水六聚体阴离子的分子动力学
articles.abstract: We studied and characterized structural, spectroscopic and dynamic properties of the triangular ring isomer of water hexamer anions (H2O)6- at low temperatures. This species binds an excess electron in a solvent cavity surrounded by six dangling hydrogen atoms in a bulk hydrated electron fashion. We find using high level quantum chemistry and molecular dynamics (MD) simulations that the species represents a local minimum on the potential energy surface (PES). Structurally, the anion is composed of two cyclic water trimers held together by a single excess electron that acts as a weak chemical bond. The most spectacular and dominant feature of the dynamics of the species is a 7 cm-1 wavenumber quasi-translational motion periodically approaching and moving away the water trimer units. Since the local potential well of the isomer is extremely shallow, we predict the species to be metastable and very fragile. As a consequence, at temperatures higher than $\sim$60 K, the isomer thermally dissociates to two stable neutral trimers and a free electron. At low temperatures, compression of the inter ring distance may lead to isomerization of the species and/or the concomitant electron detachment via quantum tunneling, resulting either a stable anionic or neutral water hexamer or two neutral trimers. Based on simple quantum mechanical model calculations, in this temperature regime, we place the minimal lifetime of the triangular ring isomer in the microdecon domain.
articles.abstract_zh: 我们研究并表征了水六聚体阴离子（H2O）6-的三角环异构体在低温下的结构、光谱和动力学性质。该物质在溶剂空腔中结合多余的电子，该溶剂空腔以大量水合电子的方式被六个悬空氢原子包围。我们通过高级量子化学和分子动力学 (MD) 模拟发现，该物质代表势能表面 (PES) 上的局部最小值。在结构上，阴离子由两个环状水三聚体组成，两个环状水三聚体通过一个作为弱化学键的多余电子结合在一起。该物种动力学最引人注目和最显着的特征是周期性接近和远离水三聚体单元的 7 cm-1 波数准平移运动。由于异构体的局部势阱非常浅，我们预测该物种是亚稳态的并且非常脆弱。因此，在高于 $\sim$60 K 的温度下，异构体热解离成两个稳定的中性三聚体和一个自由电子。在低温下，环间距离的压缩可能导致物质的异构化和/或伴随的电子通过量子隧道脱离，从而产生稳定的阴离子或中性水六聚体或两个中性三聚体。基于简单的量子力学模型计算，在此温度范围内，我们将三角环异构体的最小寿命置于微解域中。

articles.title: Interface Design and Optimization of Anode Catalyst Utilization in Water Electrolysis: Tomography-Based Modeling
articles.title_zh: 水电解中阳极催化剂利用的界面设计和优化：基于断层扫描的建模
articles.abstract: Engineering the complex transport electrodes within proton exchange membrane water electrolysis (PEMWE) is a complex task: the anode catalyst layer (ACL) properties such as activity, electrical and ionic conductivities, permeability, thickness, contact angle, and its interface with the porous transport layer (PTL) significantly influence the performance of PEMWEs. To enable better exploitation of this interplay, this study presents a two-dimensional, two-phase model to capture the ACL dependence on its PTL interface structure, quantifying catalyst utilization. The model is validated against reference polarization curves, literature-based tomographic data, and an in-house constructed digital twin of the ACL. Simulation results reveal that catalyst utilization decreases with increasing electrode potential due to pronounced product transport limitations, which can already provide impulses to future electrode engineering. To mitigate these effects, balanced and high electrical and ionic conductivities and optimal pore size at the interface are analyzed by the model. The simulation results suggest an optimal pore size of ~3 μm at ACL/PTL interface under constrained electrical conductivity, while larger pores (~6 μm) are favored when conductivity is moderate. With an improved interface, the model shows that cell performance can be improved by 11.7% and 3.2%, respectively.
articles.abstract_zh: 设计质子交换膜水电解 (PEMWE) 中的复杂传输电极是一项复杂的任务：阳极催化剂层 (ACL) 的特性，如活性、电导率和离子电导率、渗透性、厚度、接触角及其与多孔传输层 (PTL) 的界面，显着影响 PEMWE 的性能。为了更好地利用这种相互作用，本研究提出了一个二维两相模型来捕获 ACL 对其 PTL 界面结构的依赖性，从而量化催化剂的利用率。该模型根据参考极化曲线、基于文献的断层扫描数据和内部构建的 ACL 数字孪生进行了验证。模拟结果表明，由于明显的产物传输限制，催化剂利用率随着电极电势的增加而降低，这已经可以为未来的电极工程提供动力。为了减轻这些影响，通过模型分析了界面处平衡且高的电导率和离子电导率以及最佳孔径。模拟结果表明，在电导率受限的情况下，ACL/PTL 界面的最佳孔径约为 3 μm，而当电导率适中时，则倾向于较大的孔径 (~6 μm)。通过改进接口，模型显示电池性能可分别提高 11.7% 和 3.2%。

articles.title: Quantum Circuits for Matrix-Product Unitaries
articles.title_zh: 矩阵乘积酉的量子电路
articles.abstract: Author(s): Georgios Styliaris, Rahul Trivedi, and J. Ignacio Cirac Matrix-product unitaries (MPUs) are many-body unitary operators that, as a consequence of their tensor-network structure, preserve the entanglement area law in 1D systems. However, it is unknown how to implement an MPU as a quantum circuit since the individual tensors describing the MPU are not unit… [Phys. Rev. Lett. 135, 260602] Published Mon Dec 22, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Georgios Styliaris、Rahul Trivedi 和 J. Ignacio Cirac 矩阵乘积酉算子 (MPU) 是多体酉算子，由于其张量网络结构，保留了一维系统中的纠缠面积定律。然而，如何将 MPU 实现为量子电路尚不清楚，因为描述 MPU 的各个张量不是单位……[Phys.莱特牧师。 135, 260602] 发布于 2025 年 12 月 22 日星期一
authors: Georgios Styliaris, Rahul Trivedi, and J. Ignacio Cirac
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Phys. Rev. Lett.

articles.title: Global Kinetic Simulations of Monster Shocks and Their Emission
articles.title_zh: 怪物冲击及其发射的全局动力学模拟
articles.abstract: Author(s): Dominic Bernardi, Yajie Yuan, and Alexander Y. Chen Fast magnetosonic waves are one of the two low-frequency plasma modes that can exist in a neutron star magnetosphere. It was recently realized that these waves may become nonlinear within the magnetosphere and steepen into some of the strongest shocks in the universe. These shocks, when in the appro… [Phys. Rev. Lett. 135, 265201] Published Mon Dec 22, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Dominic Bernardi、Yajie Yuan 和 Alexander Y. Chen 快磁声波是中子星磁层中存在的两种低频等离子体模式之一。最近人们意识到，这些波可能在磁层内变得非线性，并陡峭地形成宇宙中一些最强的冲击。这些冲击在适当的情况下...... [物理。莱特牧师。 135, 265201] 发布于 2025 年 12 月 22 日星期一
authors: Dominic Bernardi, Yajie Yuan, and Alexander Y. Chen

articles.title: Phenomenological Ginzburg-Landau theory for triple-Q magnetic orders on a hexagonal lattice
articles.title_zh: 六角晶格上三 Q 磁阶的唯象金兹堡-朗道理论
articles.abstract: Author(s): Jin-Tao Jin and Yi Zhou Complex magnets on hexagonal lattices frequently exhibit ordering at three symmetry-related wave vectors. Here, the authors develop a comprehensive Ginzburg-Landau theory that establishes a foundational framework for triple-Q magnetic orders in O (2) and O (3) models. They derive complete phase diagrams, revealing single-Q, double-Q, and triple-Q states—including collinear, orthogonal, and 120° configurations—and analyze the associated collective excitations and symmetry breaking. This framework elucidates exotic magnetic orders in frustrated magnets such as Na 2 Co 2 TeO 6 . [Phys. Rev. B 112, 224434] Published Mon Dec 22, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Jin-Tao Jin 和 Yi Zhou 六方晶格上的复合磁体经常在三个对称相关的波矢量上表现出有序性。在这里，作者开发了一种全面的 Ginzburg-Landau 理论，该理论为 O (2) 和 O (3) 模型中的三 Q 磁阶建立了基础框架。他们得出完整的相图，揭示单 Q、双 Q 和三 Q 态（包括共线、正交和 120° 配置），并分析相关的集体激发和对称性破缺。该框架阐明了受挫磁体（例如 Na 2 Co 2 TeO 6 ）中的奇异磁序。 [物理。修订版 B 112, 224434] 于 2025 年 12 月 22 日星期一发布
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Phys. Rev. B

articles.title: Anything-goes 'anyons' may be at the root of surprising quantum experiments
articles.title_zh: 任何事情都会发生的“任意子”可能是令人惊讶的量子实验的根源
articles.abstract: In the past year, two separate experiments in two different materials captured the same confounding scenario: the coexistence of superconductivity and magnetism. Scientists had assumed that these two quantum states are mutually exclusive; the presence of one should inherently destroy the other.
articles.abstract_zh: 去年，对两种不同材料进行的两次独立实验捕捉到了相同的令人困惑的场景：超导性和磁性的共存。科学家们曾假设这两种量子态是相互排斥的。一个的存在必然会摧毁另一个。

articles.title: Kolmogorov-Arnold networks bridge AI and scientific discovery by increasing interpretability
articles.title_zh: 柯尔莫哥洛夫-阿诺德网络通过提高可解释性来架起人工智能和科学发现的桥梁
articles.abstract: AI has successfully been applied in many areas of science, advancing technologies like weather prediction and protein folding. However, there have been limitations for the world of scientific discovery involving more curiosity-driven research. But that may soon change, thanks to Kolmogorov-Arnold networks (KANs).
articles.abstract_zh: 人工智能已成功应用于许多科学领域，推进了天气预报和蛋白质折叠等技术。然而，涉及更多好奇心驱动的研究的科学发现世界存在局限性。但由于柯尔莫哥洛夫-阿诺德网络（KAN），这种情况可能很快就会改变。

articles.title: AI uncovers double-strangeness: A new double-Lambda hypernucleus
articles.title_zh: AI 揭示双重奇异性：一种新的双 Lambda 超核
articles.abstract: Researchers from the High Energy Nuclear Physics Laboratory at the RIKEN Pioneering Research Institute (PRI) in Japan and their international collaborators have made a discovery that bridges artificial intelligence and nuclear physics. By applying deep learning techniques to a vast amount of unexamined nuclear emulsion data from the J-PARC E07 experiment, the team identified, for the first time in 25 years, a new double-Lambda hypernucleus.
articles.abstract_zh: 日本理化学研究所 (RIKEN) 先锋研究所 (PRI) 高能核物理实验室的研究人员及其国际合作者取得了一项连接人工智能和核物理的发现。通过将深度学习技术应用于来自 J-PARC E07 实验的大量未经检查的核乳状液数据，该团队 25 年来首次发现了一个新的双 Lambda 超核。

articles.title: Pitfalls and prospects of quantum machine learning
articles.title_zh: 量子机器学习的陷阱和前景
articles.abstract: Nature Computational Science, Published online: 22 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s43588-025-00914-6 Quantum machine learning is being actively explored to assess whether quantum resources can enhance learning and inference, yet major obstacles remain. Here, we discuss pressing challenges and outline potential pathways toward future practical applications.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然计算科学》，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 22 日； doi:10.1038/s43588-025-00914-6 正在积极探索量子机器学习，以评估量子资源是否可以增强学习和推理，但仍然存在重大障碍。在这里，我们讨论紧迫的挑战并概述未来实际应用的潜在途径。

articles.title: Deep-learning electronic structure calculations
articles.title_zh: 深度学习电子结构计算
articles.abstract: Nature Computational Science, Published online: 22 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s43588-025-00932-4 This Review explores the integration of deep learning in first-principles electronic structure calculations, addressing the accuracy–efficiency dilemma of traditional algorithms and extending first-principles methods to unprecedented scales and complexity.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然计算科学》，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 22 日； doi:10.1038/s43588-025-00932-4 这篇综述探讨了深度学习在第一性原理电子结构计算中的集成，解决了传统算法的准确性-效率困境，并将第一性原理方法扩展到前所未有的规模和复杂性。

articles.title: Machine learning interatomic potentials at the centennial crossroads of quantum mechanics
articles.title_zh: 量子力学百年十字路口的机器学习原子间势
articles.abstract: Nature Computational Science, Published online: 22 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s43588-025-00930-6 As quantum mechanics marks its centennial, machine learning interatomic potentials are emerging as transformative tools bridging quantum accuracy with classical efficiency. This Perspective explores their evolution in terms of accuracy, efficiency, interpretability and generalizability challenges.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然计算科学》，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 22 日； doi:10.1038/s43588-025-00930-6 在量子力学迎来一百周年之际，机器学习原子间势正在成为连接量子精度和经典效率的变革性工具。本视角探讨了它们在准确性、效率、可解释性和普遍性挑战方面的演变。
