articles.title: Fractional Quantum Anomalous Hall Effect
articles.title_zh: 分数量子反常霍尔效应
articles.abstract: The realization of the fractional quantum anomalous Hall effect (FQAHE) in a zero-field fractional Chern insulator is a new advancement in condensed matter physics, resulting from the interplay among strong correlations, topology, and spontaneous time-reversal symmetry breaking in lattice systems. In this review, we highlight the experimental and theoretical progress toward achieving FQAHE in two material platforms: twisted bilayer MoTe 2 and rhombohedral-stacked multilayer graphene. These systems host narrow topological bands with nontrivial Chern numbers, enabling interaction-driven fractionalized states analogous to the fractional quantum Hall effect, but without external magnetic fields. We discuss how spontaneous ferromagnetism, moiré lattice reconstruction, and band topological effects underpin the emergence of FQAHE in twisted MoTe 2 . We describe experimental discoveries of zero-field fractional Chern insulators in both transport and optical experiments, as well as signatures of composite Fermi liquids and higher-energy Chern band, which may shed light on engineering nonabelian states. In rhombohedral graphene/hexagonal boron nitride moiré superlattices, we review the recent observations of fractionally quantized Hall resistance, connections between FQAHE and extended quantum anomalous Hall phases, and the coexistence of superconductivity and FQAHE. These discoveries not only deepen our understanding of strongly correlated topological matter but also open new frontiers for exploring nonabelian anyons, fault-tolerant quantum computation, and topological opto-spintronics free of magnetic fields.
articles.abstract_zh: 在零场分数陈绝缘体中实现分数量子反常霍尔效应（FQAHE）是凝聚态物理的一项新进展，这是晶格系统中强相关性、拓扑结构和自发时间反演对称性破缺之间相互作用的结果。在这篇综述中，我们重点介绍了在两种材料平台上实现 FQAHE 的实验和理论进展：扭曲双层 MoTe 2 和菱形堆叠多层石墨烯。这些系统具有具有非平凡陈数的窄拓扑带，能够实现类似于分数量子霍尔效应的相互作用驱动的分数化状态，但无需外部磁场。我们讨论了自发铁磁性、莫尔晶格重构和能带拓扑效应如何支撑扭曲 MoTe 2 中 FQAHE 的出现。我们描述了输运和光学实验中零场分数陈绝缘体的实验发现，以及复合费米液体和高能陈能带的特征，这可能为工程非阿贝尔态带来启示。在菱面体石墨烯/六方氮化硼莫尔超晶格中，我们回顾了最近对分数量子化霍尔电阻的观察、FQAHE 和扩展量子反常霍尔相之间的联系以及超导性和 FQAHE 的共存。这些发现不仅加深了我们对强相关拓扑物质的理解，而且为探索非阿贝尔任意子、容错量子计算和无磁场的拓扑光自旋电子学开辟了新的前沿。
authors: Ting Cao, Liang Fu, Long Ju, Di Xiao and Xiaodong Xu

articles.title: Shear Mechanics of Articular Cartilage and Cartilage-Inspired Materials
articles.title_zh: 关节软骨和软骨启发材料的剪切力学
articles.abstract: Articular cartilage is a load-bearing, hierarchically organized tissue composed of a network of type II collagen embedded in an aggrecan-rich polyelectrolyte gel. Its ability to resist deformation and dissipate energy arises from spatially varying matrix composition and architecture. Here, we review experimental and theoretical advances that elucidate the mechanistic basis of cartilage shear mechanics. Recent studies have shown that the tissue operates near a rigidity transition, in which small changes in collagen density, cross-linking, or osmotic stress can produce large, nonlinear changes in shear stiffness. We discuss how this behavior is captured by models rooted in rigidity percolation, continuum elasticity, and micromechanics, and how these frameworks connect depth-dependent composition to macroscale mechanical response. Throughout, we emphasize physical principles that describe observations across native, degraded, and engineered tissues, and we highlight emerging strategies for designing cartilage-inspired materials with tunable, anisotropic mechanics, with applications in soft robotics, synthetic gels, and load-bearing biomaterials.
articles.abstract_zh: 关节软骨是一种承重、分层组织的组织，由嵌入富含聚集蛋白聚糖的聚电解质凝胶中的 II 型胶原蛋白网络组成。其抵抗变形和耗散能量的能力源于空间变化的基体成分和结构。在这里，我们回顾了阐明软骨剪切力学机制基础的实验和理论进展。最近的研究表明，组织在刚性转变附近运行，其中胶原蛋白密度、交联或渗透应力的微小变化可以产生剪切刚度的大的非线性变化。我们讨论了如何通过基于刚性渗透、连续弹性和微观力学的模型来捕获这种行为，以及这些框架如何将深度相关的成分与宏观力学响应联系起来。在整个过程中，我们强调描述天然组织、降解组织和工程组织观察结果的物理原理，并重点介绍设计具有可调、各向异性力学的软骨启发材料的新兴策略，以及在软机器人、合成凝胶和承载生物材料中的应用。
authors: Jonathan Michel, Itai Cohen, Lawrence J. Bonassar and Moumita Das

articles.title: Conformational change and diffusion dynamics of passive and active filaments in network environments
articles.title_zh: 网络环境中被动和主动丝的构象变化和扩散动力学
articles.abstract: Structure and dynamics of filamentous molecules in cross-linked network environments are crucial for diverse biological processes. We perform a systematic study for the conformational change and diffusion dynamics of both passive and active chains in the polymer networks based on Langevin dynamics simulations. Our results demonstrate a series of intriguing phenomena, via tuning network bending modulus, volume fraction, and chain activity. For a passive chain, strong confinement of network accounts for a remarkable conformational compaction. A robust subdiffusion scaled with mean square displacement ∼ τ α ( α < 1) is observed in accordance with a long-time memory effect. Under the concentrated network condition, the stiffness of a network plays a role in stretching the chain and impeding the diffusion dynamics. For an active chain, self-propulsion of the chain can overcome the confinement of network, realizing a swollen conformation and a transformation from subdiffusion to normal diffusion. In a dense network with rigidity, active chain suffers from a non-monotonic conformational change. Moderate activity induces an unconventional collapse effect. Our work highlights the new physics arising from the interplay between activity, conformational degrees of freedom of the probed chain, and the cross-linked network structure, which has no analogy in a nanoparticle probe system.
articles.abstract_zh: 交联网络环境中丝状分子的结构和动力学对于多种生物过程至关重要。我们基于朗之万动力学模拟对聚合物网络中被动​​链和主动链的构象变化和扩散动力学进行了系统研究。通过调整网络弯曲模量、体积分数和链活性，我们的结果展示了一系列有趣的现象。对于被动链，网络的强限制导致了显着的构象压缩。根据长期记忆效应，观察到以均方位移 ∼ τ α ( α < 1) 缩放的鲁棒子扩散。在集中网络条件下，网络的刚度起着拉伸链条和阻碍扩散动力学的作用。对于一条活跃的链，链的自推进可以克服网络的限制，实现膨胀构象以及从亚扩散到正常扩散的转变。在具有刚性的致密网络中，活性链会发生非单调构象变化。适度的活动会引发非常规的塌陷效应。我们的工作强调了由活性、被探测链的构象自由度和交联网络结构之间的相互作用产生的新物理现象，这在纳米颗粒探针系统中是没有类比的。
articles.journal: The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue

articles.title: Titanium phosphate glasses: Beyond tetrahedral network structures
articles.title_zh: 磷酸钛玻璃：超越四面体网络结构
articles.abstract: The structure of titanium phosphate glasses (TiO 2 ) x (P 2 O 5 ) 1− x with 0.70 ≤ x ≤ 0.75 was investigated by combining neutron and high-energy x-ray diffraction with solid-state 31 P nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) and Raman spectroscopy. The results were interpreted with the aid of an analytical model that delivers the composition dependence of the structural motifs. The structure of these materials was also simulated using ab initio molecular dynamics. A detailed 31 P magic-angle spinning (MAS) NMR lineshape analysis, aided by the results obtained from double-quantum coherence spectroscopy, indicates the presence of P–O–P-connected network forming units at a level decreasing from 23% to 11% with increasing x . The diffraction results show a Ti–O coordination number of 5.32(7) at x = 0.715 that increases to 5.49(7) at x = 0.750. The findings demonstrate the prevalence of five- and six-coordinated titanium atoms and the coexistence of both two-coordinated oxygen atoms, O(II), and three-coordinated oxygen atoms, O(III). The Ti-centered polyhedra contribute to a network in which the phosphate groups form P–O(II)–Ti and P–O(III)–2Ti connections, with signatures that are evident in the 31 P MAS NMR spectra. The results suggest that structural variability is a key factor in promoting vitrification in this atypical glass-forming system. The findings provide a benchmark for investigating the structure of other glass-forming materials based on networks of higher-coordinated polyhedral units.
articles.abstract_zh: 通过将中子和高能 X 射线衍射与固态 31 P 核磁共振 (NMR) 和拉曼光谱相结合，研究了 0.70 ≤ x ≤ 0.75 的钛磷酸盐玻璃 (TiO 2 ) x (P 2 O 5 ) 1− x 的结构。借助分析模型解释结果，该模型提供了结构基序的组成依赖性。这些材料的结构也使用从头算分子动力学进行模拟。详细的 31 P 魔角旋转 (MAS) NMR 线形分析，在双量子相干光谱获得的结果的辅助下，表明存在 P-O-P 连接的网络形成单元，其水平随着 x 的增加从 23% 降低到 11%。衍射结果显示，x = 0.715 时 Ti-O 配位数为 5.32(7)，x = 0.750 时增加至 5.49(7)。研究结果表明，五配位和六配位钛原子普遍存在，并且二配位氧原子 O(II) 和三配位氧原子 O(III) 共存。以 Ti 为中心的多面体构成了一个网络，其中磷酸基团形成 P–O(II)–Ti 和 P–O(III)–2Ti 连接，其特征在 31 P MAS NMR 谱中很明显。结果表明，结构变异性是促进这种非典型玻璃形成系统玻璃化的关键因素。这些发现为研究基于更高配位多面体单元网络的其他玻璃形成材料的结构提供了基准。
articles.journal: The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue

articles.title: Local atomic structural descriptor and crystal field determined Ru 1− x Ir x O 2 as oxygen evolution catalyst unifying stability and activity
articles.title_zh: 局部原子结构描述符和晶体场确定 Ru 1− x Ir x O 2 作为析氧催化剂，统一稳定性和活性
articles.abstract: Ru/Ir oxides represent the promising catalysts of oxygen evolution reaction (OER) with better stability than Ru oxides and lower overpotentials than Ir oxides. To elucidate the activity and stability mechanisms of Ru 1− x Ir x O 2 at an acceptable computation cost, the proposed local atomic structural descriptors are used to predicate OER intermediate adsorption ability and solvation effect accurately, and the cluster expansion (CE) method is applied to determine the ground state at given Ir concentration. Further analysis shows that Ru–O–Ir local configuration is the atomic fingerprint of Ru 1− x Ir x O 2 structures, unifying both OER activity and stability. Crystal field analysis reveals that the Ru atom makes the dz2 band center of the Ir site atom upshift to achieve weak *OOH adsorption for high OER activity, while Ir atoms effectively lower the t 2g orbital of the Ru atom to stabilize the structures. Our work not only addresses the activity–stability trade-off in Ru/Ir oxides but also advances the fundamental understanding of descriptor-based and CE models.
articles.abstract_zh: Ru/Ir氧化物是有前途的析氧反应（OER）催化剂，其稳定性比Ru氧化物更好，过电势比Ir氧化物更低。为了以可接受的计算成本阐明Ru 1− x Ir x O 2 的活性和稳定性机制，所提出的局部原子结构描述符用于准确预测OER中间吸附能力和溶剂化效应，并应用簇扩展（CE）方法来确定给定Ir浓度下的基态。进一步分析表明，Ru-O-Ir 局部构型是 Ru 1− x Ir x O 2 结构的原子指纹，统一了 OER 活性和稳定性。晶场分析表明，Ru原子使Ir位原子的dz2能带中心上移，实现弱*OOH吸附，从而实现高OER活性，而Ir原子有效降低Ru原子的t 2g轨道以稳定结构。我们的工作不仅解决了 Ru/Ir 氧化物的活性与稳定性的权衡问题，而且增进了对基于描述符和 CE 模型的基本理解。
articles.journal: The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue

articles.title: Internal protein motion in a rough model potential
articles.title_zh: 粗略模型潜力中的内部蛋白质运动
articles.abstract: Proteins are understood to exhibit complex internal motions on multiple time scales in their rugged free energy landscapes and often show subdiffusive behavior that significantly influences their biochemical functions. In this study, we employ the fractional Fokker–Planck equation and continuous-time random walk models to investigate the anomalous diffusion of particles within rough confining potentials, drawing inspiration from protein internal dynamics. Our analysis reveals that the dynamics exhibit three distinct regimes: initial free subdiffusion, an intermediate regime where roughness markedly impacts motion, and a long-term thermal plateau due to confinement effects. We derive approximate expressions for the mean displacement and the ensemble-averaged mean squared displacement in the low-roughness limit, revealing good agreement with simulation results. Furthermore, our examination of the ergodic properties of the dynamics indicates that systems with high roughness exhibit enhanced weak ergodicity breaking. As a consequence, the time-averaged mean squared displacement does not reach a plateau but shows a power-law increase in time and individual trajectories intrinsically exhibit an amplitude scatter. In addition, we demonstrate that the mean maximal excursion effectively quantifies the extent of confinement, offering a robust measure for characterizing subdiffusive dynamics in complex systems.
articles.abstract_zh: 据了解，蛋白质在其崎岖的自由能景观中在多个时间尺度上表现出复杂的内部运动，并且经常表现出显着影响其生化功能的亚扩散行为。在这项研究中，我们从蛋白质内部动力学中汲取灵感，采用分数福克-普朗克方程和连续时间随机游走模型来研究颗粒在粗糙限制势内的反常扩散。我们的分析表明，动力学表现出三种不同的状态：初始自由次扩散、粗糙度显着影响运动的中间状态以及由于限制效应而导致的长期热平台。我们推导了低粗糙度极限下的平均位移和整体平均均方位移的近似表达式，与模拟结果吻合良好。此外，我们对动力学遍历特性的检查表明，具有高粗糙度的系统表现出增强的弱遍历破坏。因此，时间平均均方位移并未达到稳定状态，而是表现出随时间的幂律增加，并且各个轨迹本质上表现出幅度分散。此外，我们证明平均最大偏移有效地量化了限制的程度，为表征复杂系统中的次扩散动力学提供了可靠的测量方法。
articles.journal: The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue

articles.title: Velocity measurement in porous media using steady-state free precession—Analytical solution to the Bloch–Torrey equation with flow
articles.title_zh: 使用稳态自由进动测量多孔介质中的速度 - 带流动的 Bloch-Torrey 方程的解析解
articles.abstract: In this study, fluid velocity is measured in a porous medium using a magnetic resonance steady state free precession (SSFP) technique. As shown theoretically and experimentally in this study, the SSFP measurement under steady flow conditions produces a periodic steady state magnetization with a strong flow sensitivity. The Bloch–Torrey equations were solved analytically using a Fourier series to predict the distortion of the steady state response due to flow. The analytical solution accurately describes the measured steady state longitudinal magnetization and transverse magnetization phase to permit the determination of the fluid velocity in a Bentheimer sandstone core plug non-invasively.
articles.abstract_zh: 在本研究中，使用磁共振稳态自由进动 (SSFP) 技术测量多孔介质中的流体速度。正如本研究中的理论和实验所示，稳定流条件下的 SSFP 测量会产生具有强流敏感性的周期性稳态磁化强度。使用傅里叶级数对 Bloch-Torrey 方程进行分析求解，以预测由于流动而导致的稳态响应的失真。该解析解准确地描述了测量的稳态纵向磁化强度和横向磁化强度相位，从而可以非侵入性地确定本特海默砂岩岩心塞中的流体速度。
articles.journal: The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue

articles.title: Quantum entanglement could connect drones for disaster relief, bypassing traditional networks
articles.title_zh: 量子纠缠可以绕过传统网络连接无人机进行救灾
articles.abstract: Any time you use a device to communicate information—an email, a text message, any data transfer—the information in that transmission crosses the open internet, where it could be intercepted. Such communications are also reliant on internet connectivity, often including wireless signal on either or both ends of a transmission.
articles.abstract_zh: 每当您使用设备传递信息（电子邮件、短信、任何数据传输）时，传输中的信息都会穿过开放的互联网，从而可能被拦截。此类通信还依赖于互联网连接，通常包括传输一端或两端的无线信号。

articles.abstract: Author(s): Avedis Neehus, Achim Rosch, Johannes Knolle, and Urban F. P. Seifert Altermagnets are a new class of symmetry-compensated magnets with large spin splittings. Here, we show that the notion of altermagnetism extends beyond the realm of Landau-type order: we study exactly solvable ${\mathbb{Z}}_{2}$ quantum spin(-orbital) liquids (QSLs), which simultaneously support mag… [Phys. Rev. Lett. 135, 256504] Published Fri Dec 19, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Avedis Neehus、Achim Rosch、Johannes Knolle 和 Urban F. P. Seifert Altermagnets 是一类具有大自旋分裂的新型对称补偿磁体。在这里，我们证明交变磁性的概念超出了朗道型序的领域：我们研究了完全可解的 ${\mathbb{Z}}_{2}$ 量子自旋（-轨道）液体（QSL），它同时支持磁... [Phys.莱特牧师。 135, 256504] 发布于 2025 年 12 月 19 日星期五
authors: Avedis Neehus, Achim Rosch, Johannes Knolle, and Urban F. P. Seifert

articles.title: On-chip magnon-polaron generation in mode-matched cavity magnomechanics
articles.title_zh: 模式匹配腔磁力力学中的片上磁振子极化子生成
articles.abstract: Author(s): Daiki Hatanaka, Motoki Asano, Megumi Kurosu, Yoshitaka Taniyasu, Hajime Okamoto, and Hiroshi Yamaguchi Magnon polarons are essential for coherent control in acoustic and spintronic devices, but conventional structures based on magnetic thin films on thick piezoelectric substrates suffer from weak magnon-phonon coupling, due to poor spatial mode overlap. The authors overcome this limitation by employing a mode-matched planar magnomechanical system, with a thin piezoelectric film and a micrometer-thick magnetic layer. This configuration enables deeply distributed magnon modes and enhances magnetoelastic interactions with microwave phonons. As a result, the team observes clear formation of magnon polarons, manifested as pronounced avoided crossings in the spectra. [Phys. Rev. Applied 24, 064053] Published Fri Dec 19, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Daiki Hatanaka、Motoki Asano、Megumi Kurosu、Yoshitaka Taniyasu、Hajime Okamoto 和 Hiroshi Yamaguchi 磁振子极化子对于声学和自旋电子器件的相干控制至关重要，但由于空间模式重叠较差，基于厚压电基板上磁性薄膜的传统结构会受到弱磁振子-声子耦合的影响。作者通过采用模式匹配的平面磁力系统克服了这一限制，该系统具有薄的压电薄膜和微米厚的磁性层。这种配置可实现深度分布的磁振子模式，并增强与微波声子的磁弹性相互作用。结果，该团队观察到磁振子极化子的清晰形成，表现为光谱中明显避免的交叉。 [物理。 Rev. Applied 24, 064053] 2025 年 12 月 19 日星期五发布
authors: Daiki Hatanaka, Motoki Asano, Megumi Kurosu, Yoshitaka Taniyasu, Hajime Okamoto, and Hiroshi Yamaguchi

articles.title: Quantum cryptography beyond key distribution: Theory and experiment
articles.title_zh: 超越密钥分发的量子密码学：理论与实验
articles.abstract: Author(s): Mathieu Bozzio, Claude Crépeau, Petros Wallden, and Philip Walther Cryptography not only involves the sending of secret messages but also encompasses many protocols and procedures that provide privacy and security in the networked world. Likewise, quantum resources have the potential to enhance cryptography in ways that go beyond the well-known example of quantum key distribution. This review offers a classification of the main crypto primitives that are available quantum mechanically. It explains the security that they offer, including the sometimes significant limitations on their theoretical capabilities. Implementations using current photonic techniques are discussed. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 97, 045006] Published Fri Dec 19, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Mathieu Bozzio、Claude Crépeau、Petros Wallden 和 Philip Walther 密码学不仅涉及秘密消息的发送，还包含许多在网络世界中提供隐私和安全的协议和程序。同样，量子资源有潜力以超出众所周知的量子密钥分发示例的方式增强密码学。这篇评论提供了量子力学上可用的主要加密原语的分类。它解释了它们提供的安全性，包括有时对其理论能力的重大限制。讨论了使用当前光子技术的实现。 [牧师。模组。物理。 97, 045006] 发布于 2025 年 12 月 19 日星期五
authors: Mathieu Bozzio, Claude Crépeau, Petros Wallden, and Philip Walther
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Rev. Mod. Phys.

articles.title: New 'cloaking device' concept shields electronics from disruptive magnetic fields
articles.title_zh: 新的“隐形装置”概念可保护电子设备免受破坏性磁场的影响
articles.abstract: University of Leicester engineers have unveiled a concept for a device designed to magnetically "cloak" sensitive components, making them invisible to detection.
articles.abstract_zh: 莱斯特大学的工程师公布了一种设备的概念，该设备旨在通过磁性“隐藏”敏感组件，使其不被检测到。

articles.title: Measuring how materials hotter than the sun's surface conduct electricity
articles.title_zh: 测量比太阳表面更热的材料如何导电
articles.abstract: Warm dense matter is a state of matter that forms at extreme temperatures and pressures, like those found at the center of most stars and many planets, including Earth. It also plays a role in the generation of Earth's magnetic field and in the process of nuclear fusion.
articles.abstract_zh: 温暖的致密物质是在极端温度和压力下形成的一种物质状态，就像在大多数恒星和包括地球在内的许多行星中心发现的物质一样。它还在地球磁场的产生和核聚变过程中发挥作用。

articles.title: Machine learning and microscopy solve 170-year-old mystery of premelting ice
articles.title_zh: 机器学习和显微镜解开了 170 年来冰预融化之谜
articles.abstract: Through a novel combination of machine learning and atomic force microscopy, researchers in China have unveiled the molecular surface structure of "premelted" ice, resolving a long-standing mystery surrounding the liquid-like layer which forms on icy surfaces.
articles.abstract_zh: 通过机器学习和原子力显微镜的新颖结合，中国研究人员揭示了“预融化”冰的分子表面结构，解决了围绕冰表面形成的液体层的长期谜团。

articles.title: A cryogenic winter for tomorrow's accelerator
articles.title_zh: 明天加速器的低温冬天
articles.abstract: Behind every particle collision generated at the Large Hadron Collider is a multitude of technical feats. One of these is refrigeration on an industrial scale. To guide the particles, the thousands of superconducting magnets in the accelerator must be cooled to a temperature of close to absolute zero. This makes the LHC the largest cryogenic installation in the world: 23 of its 27 kilometers are maintained at 1.9 Kelvin (-271°C) using refrigerators in which superfluid helium circulates.
articles.abstract_zh: 大型强子对撞机产生的每一次粒子碰撞背后都蕴藏着众多技术成就。其中之一是工业规模的制冷。为了引导粒子，加速器中的数千个超导磁体必须冷却到接近绝对零的温度。这使得大型强子对撞机成为世界上最大的低温装置：其 27 公里长中的 23 公里使用超流氦循环的冰箱将温度维持在 1.9 开尔文 (-271°C)。

articles.title: Why quantum computers have memory problems over time
articles.title_zh: 为什么量子计算机随着时间的推移会出现内存问题
articles.abstract: A team of Australian and international scientists has, for the first time, created a full picture of how errors unfold over time inside a quantum computer—a breakthrough that could help make future quantum machines far more reliable.
articles.abstract_zh: 由澳大利亚和国际科学家组成的团队首次描绘了量子计算机内部错误如何随时间推移而展开的全貌——这一突破可能有助于使未来的量子计算机更加可靠。

articles.title: Electrolyte reduction on cathodes to enhance the performance of high-energy batteries
articles.title_zh: 阴极电解质还原以增强高能电池的性能
articles.abstract: Nature Chemistry, Published online: 19 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s41557-025-02009-1 The success of Li batteries relies on electrolyte reduction at anodes for interphase formation, yet controlled interphase formation on high-energy cathodes has proven challenging. Now it has been shown that a bimolecular nucleophilic substitution-assisted strategy advances both primary and secondary batteries by regulating the electrolyte reduction potential and interphase passivation capability.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然化学》，在线发表：2025 年 12 月 19 日； doi:10.1038/s41557-025-02009-1 锂电池的成功依赖于阳极电解质还原以形成界面，但事实证明，高能阴极上受控界面形成具有挑战性。现在已经表明，双分子亲核取代辅助策略通过调节电解质还原电位和相间钝化能力来促进一次和二次电池的发展。

articles.title: The design of analogue in-memory computing tiles
articles.title_zh: 模拟内存计算块的设计
articles.abstract: Nature Electronics, Published online: 19 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s41928-025-01537-5 This Perspective examines the design of non-volatile memristive analogue in-memory computing tiles for deep neural network accelerators, considering the challenges and opportunities associated with designing the different components and providing projections for how technology scaling may impact key design elements.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然电子》，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 19 日； doi:10.1038/s41928-025-01537-5 本视角研究了深度神经网络加速器的非易失性忆阻模拟内存计算块的设计，考虑了与设计不同组件相关的挑战和机遇，并提供了技术扩展如何影响关键设计元素的预测。

articles.title: Advances in Transmission Electron Microscopy to Image Nanocrystals
articles.title_zh: 透射电子显微镜成像纳米晶体的进展
articles.abstract: Recent advancements in transmission electron microscopy (TEM) have substantially expanded our capability to observe nanocrystals at unprecedented spatial and temporal resolutions. Innovations in TEM instruments, specimen preparation, and imaging modality have overcome historical limitations related to radiation damage, weak contrast for light elements, 2D projection limitations, and high-vacuum constraints. Additionally, advanced image processing techniques, particularly those incorporating machine learning, have enhanced data interpretation by enabling denoising, segmentation, and quantitative analysis. These advancements now enable the atomic-scale visualization of structural motifs, defects, strain distributions, and dynamic structural transformations of nanocrystals in realistic environments, including liquids and gases. The integration of these emerging TEM techniques promises novel insights into nanoscale processes that directly link atomic structure and dynamics to functional properties, thus significantly advancing the ultimate goal of materials by design.
articles.abstract_zh: 透射电子显微镜 (TEM) 的最新进展极大地扩展了我们以前所未有的空间和时间分辨率观察纳米晶体的能力。 TEM 仪器、样品制备和成像方式的创新克服了与辐射损伤、轻元素对比度弱、二维投影限制和高真空约束相关的历史限制。此外，先进的图像处理技术，特别是那些结合了机器学习的技术，通过实现去噪、分割和定量分析来增强数据解释。这些进步现在使得能够在现实环境（包括液体和气体）中对纳米晶体的结构图案、缺陷、应变分布和动态结构转变进行原子级可视化。这些新兴 TEM 技术的集成为纳米级过程提供了新的见解，将原子结构和动力学与功能特性直接联系起来，从而通过设计显着推进材料的最终目标。
authors: Sungsu Kang, Minyoung Lee, Jinho Rhee, Seol-Ha Jeong and Jungwon Park

articles.title: Probing forced responses and causality in data-driven climate emulators: Conceptual limitations and the role of reduced-order models
articles.title_zh: 探索数据驱动的气候模拟器中的强制响应和因果关系：概念限制和降阶模型的作用
articles.abstract: Author(s): Fabrizio Falasca This work argues, through simplified dynamical systems, that the skill of data-driven climate models critically depends on nonunique choices of coarse-grained representations and stochastic parametrizations. Reduced-order models, tailored to specific scales and processes, are highlighted as valid alternatives to general-purpose emulators. Linear-response theory is proposed as a principled framework to evaluate neural models beyond stationary statistics and to probe causal mechanisms. A “real-world” application is presented by constructing a coarse-grained data-driven model that can be used for causal inference through forced responses. [Phys. Rev. Research 7, 043314] Published Fri Dec 19, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Fabrizio Falasca 这项工作认为，通过简化的动力系统，数据驱动的气候模型的技能关键取决于粗粒度表示和随机参数化的非唯一选择。针对特定规模和流程定制的降阶模型被强调为通用仿真器的有效替代方案。线性响应理论被提出作为评估静态统计之外的神经模型并探索因果机制的原则框架。通过构建粗粒度数据驱动模型来呈现“现实世界”应用程序，该模型可用于通过强制响应进行因果推理。 [物理。 Rev. Research 7, 043314] 2025 年 12 月 19 日星期五发布

articles.title: Orbital magnetization as the origin of the nonlinear Hall effect

articles.abstract: Author(s): Zesheng Zhang, Xin-Zhi Li, and Wen-Yu He Orbital magnetization is established as the origin of the nonlinear Hall effect by deriving an explicit formula connecting the electric-field-induced orbital magnetization to the second-order nonlinear Hall conductivity. The applied electric field is shown to play dual roles in generating the nonlinear Hall effect by first generating a nonequilibrium orbital magnetization and then perturbing the associated edge states, and a unique nonlinear Hall effect is predicted in isotropic chiral metals driven by a noncollinear bichromatic electric field. [Phys. Rev. Research 7, L042064] Published Fri Dec 19, 2025

articles.title: Data-driven multiscale modeling for correcting dynamical systems
articles.title_zh: 用于校正动力系统的数据驱动的多尺度建模
articles.abstract: We propose a multiscale approach for predicting quantities in dynamical systems which is explicitly structured to extract information in both fine-to-coarse and coarse-to-fine directions. Our approach improves model accuracy and stability with minimally increased computation compared to non-multiscale approaches with analogous network architecture. We evaluate our approach on an idealized fluid subgrid parameterization (known as closure) task in which our multiscale networks correct chaotic underlying models to reflect the contributions of unresolved, fine-scale dynamics.
articles.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于预测动态系统中的数量的多尺度方法，该方法具有明确的结构，可以在从精细到粗略和从粗略到精细的方向上提取信息。与具有类似网络架构的非多尺度方法相比，我们的方法以最小程度增加的计算量提高了模型的准确性和稳定性。我们在理想化流体子网格参数化（称为闭包）任务上评估我们的方法，其中我们的多尺度网络纠正混沌基础模型以反映未解决的精细尺度动力学的贡献。
authors: Karl Otness, Laure Zanna and Joan Bruna

articles.title: Dynamic sparse physics-aware network for solving partial differential equations on multiple grid types
articles.title_zh: 用于求解多种网格类型上的偏微分方程的动态稀疏物理感知网络
articles.abstract: Neural network have been widely applied for solving partial differential equations (PDEs), but they still exhibit limitations. Recently, transformer-based operators, which have demonstrated exceptional performance in fields like computer vision, have been adapted for PDE solving. We propose a dynamic sparse physics-aware network (DSPAN) based on a physics-slicing mechanism and a TopK selection architecture. First, the input features are partitioned into slices to capture the intrinsic physical states. Then, these slices are scored for importance, and only the top K most critical slices are selected for attention computation. This architecture effectively captures the underlying physical information in PDEs while improving computational efficiency, achieving dual gains in both accuracy and speed. Experiments show that DSPAN achieves a relative improvement 15.35% on eight benchmark data sets, with a particularly notable 33% enhancement in plasticity equations. This robustly validates the algorithm’s capability to deliver highly accurate and resource-efficient solutions for complex PDE systems.
articles.abstract_zh: 神经网络已广泛应用于求解偏微分方程（PDE），但它们仍然存在局限性。最近，基于变压器的算子在计算机视觉等领域表现出了卓越的性能，已适用于偏微分方程求解。我们提出了一种基于物理切片机制和 TopK 选择架构的动态稀疏物理感知网络（DSPAN）。首先，将输入特征划分为切片以捕获内在的物理状态。然后，对这些切片的重要性进行评分，并且仅选择前 K 个最关键的切片进行注意力计算。该架构有效地捕获了偏微分方程中的底层物理信息，同时提高了计算效率，实现了精度和速度的双重增益。实验表明，DSPAN 在 8 个基准数据集上实现了 15.35% 的相对改进，尤其是可塑性方程提高了 33%。这有力地验证了该算法为复杂的偏微分方程系统提供高度准确且资源高效的解决方案的能力。
authors: Xichen Cao, Peizhi Zhao, Qinglong Ma and Tao Song

articles.title: Microscopic evidence of a field-induced critical spin-liquid state in a frustrated metal
articles.title_zh: 受挫金属中场诱导临界自旋液体状态的微观证据
articles.abstract: Author(s): I. Ishant, Z. Guguchia, V. Fritsch, O. Stockert, and M. Majumder Here, the authors use the transverse-field muon spin relaxation/rotation technique to microscopically map how a magnetic field (applied along the crystallographic c axis) reshapes the quantum phases of the long-known frustrated kagome metal CePdAl. They reveal a field-induced spin-liquid state with quantum critical fluctuations—exceptionally rare in metallic frustrated systems. This powerful probe uncovers critical spin-liquid behavior with antiferromagnetic spin fluctuations, hidden to bulk and neutron measurements, establishing CePdAl as a benchmark for metallic frustration. [Phys. Rev. B 112, L220409] Published Thu Dec 18, 2025

articles.title: Self-Organization, Memory, and Learning: From Driven Disordered Systems to Living Matter
articles.title_zh: 自组织、记忆和学习：从受驱动的无序系统到生命物质
articles.abstract: Disordered systems subject to a fluctuating environment can self-organize into a complex history-dependent response, retaining a memory of the driving. In sheared amorphous solids, self-organization is established by the emergence of a persistent system of mechanical instabilities that can repeatedly be triggered by the driving, leading to a state of high mechanical reversibility. As a result of self-organization, the response of the system becomes correlated with the dynamics of its environment, which can be viewed as a sensing mechanism of the system's environment. Such phenomena emerge across a wide variety of soft matter systems, suggesting that they are generic and, hence, may depend very little on the underlying specifics. We review self-organization in driven amorphous solids, concluding with a discussion of what self-organization in driven disordered systems can teach us about how simple organisms sense and adapt to their changing environments.
articles.abstract_zh: 受波动环境影响的无序系统可以自组织成复杂的依赖于历史的响应，保留驾驶的记忆。在剪切无定形固体中，自组织是通过机械不稳定性的持久系统的出现而建立的，该系统可以通过驱动反复触发，从而导致高机械可逆性状态。由于自组织，系统的响应与其环境的动态相关，这可以被视为系统环境的感知机制。这种现象出现在各种各样的软物质系统中，这表明它们是通用的，因此可能很少依赖于潜在的细节。我们回顾了驱动无定形固体中的自组织，最后讨论了驱动无序系统中的自组织可以教会我们简单有机体如何感知和适应不断变化的环境。
authors: Muhittin Mungan, Eric Clément, Damien Vandembroucq and Srikanth Sastry

articles.title: Evaluating probabilistic deep learning methods for uncertainty quantification of temperature downscaling
articles.title_zh: 评估温度降尺度不确定性量化的概率深度学习方法
articles.abstract: Deep learning (DL) has emerged as a promising tool for downscaling coarse-resolution climate data to high-resolution outputs, enabling improved regional climate predictions. A critical aspect of DL-based downscaling is the incorporation of uncertainty quantification (UQ), which enhances the interpretability and reliability of predictions—key factors for climate risk assessment and decision-making. This study develops a DL model to downscale 2 m temperature across the contiguous United States using reanalysis datasets. We systematically evaluate three epistemic UQ methods—deep ensembles (DEns), Monte Carlo dropout (MCD), and Flipout—based on their probabilistic accuracy, downscaling performance, sensitivity to geographical features, and computational efficiency. Results indicate that MCD generally outperforms Flipout and DEns in terms of calibration and downscaling accuracy. However, DEns demonstrate lower calibration errors in coastal regions, indicating its higher confidence within these areas. Flipout, in contrast, is more sensitive to elevation gradients and exhibits higher calibration errors in mountainous regions. Hence, the choice of UQ method for this task depends on the specific requirements of the application. For applications that prioritize overall calibration, downscaling accuracy, and computational efficiency, MCD is a strong candidate. These findings highlight the importance of selecting UQ methods based on application-specific requirements, such as geographical context and computational constraints. By addressing the trade-offs between UQ methods, this study provides actionable insights for improving the reliability, scalability, and utility of DL-based downscaling in climate science.
articles.abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 已成为一种很有前途的工具，可将粗分辨率气候数据缩小为高分辨率输出，从而改进区域气候预测。基于深度学习的降尺度的一个关键方面是纳入不确定性量化 (UQ)，这增强了预测的可解释性和可靠性——气候风险评估和决策的关键因素。本研究开发了一个深度学习模型，利用再分析数据集将美国本土的温度降低 2 m。我们系统地评估了三种认知 UQ 方法——深度集成 (DEns)、蒙特卡罗 dropout (MCD) 和 Flipout——基于它们的概率准确性、缩减性能、对地理特征的敏感性和计算效率。结果表明，MCD 在校准和缩小精度方面通常优于 Flipout 和 DEns。然而，DEns 在沿海地区表现出较低的校准误差，表明其在这些地区的置信度较高。相比之下，Flipout 对海拔梯度更敏感，并且在山区表现出更高的校准误差。因此，针对此任务选择 UQ 方法取决于应用程序的具体要求。对于优先考虑整体校准、缩小精度和计算效率的应用，MCD 是一个强有力的候选者。这些发现强调了根据特定应用要求（例如地理背景和计算限制）选择昆士兰大学方法的重要性。通过解决昆士兰大学方法之间的权衡，这项研究为提高气候科学中基于深度学习的降尺度的可靠性、可扩展性和实用性提供了可行的见解。
authors: Yannic Lops, Gemma J Anderson, Donald D Lucas, Indrasis Chakraborty and Daniel Galea

articles.title: Accelerating quantum Monte Carlo calculations with set-equivariant architectures and transfer learning
articles.title_zh: 利用集合等变架构和迁移学习加速量子蒙特卡罗计算
articles.abstract: Machine-learning ansätze have greatly expanded the accuracy and reach of variational quantum Monte Carlo (QMC) calculations, in particular when exploring the manifold quantum phenomena exhibited by spin systems. However, the scalability of QMC is still compromised by several other bottlenecks, and specifically those related to the actual evaluation of observables based on random deviates that lies at the core of the approach. Here we show how the set-transformer architecture can be used to dramatically accelerate or even bypass that step, especially for time-consuming operators such as powers of the magnetization. We illustrate the procedure with a range of examples structured around quantum spin systems with long-range interactions, and comprising both regressions (to predict observables) and classifications (to detect phase transitions). Moreover, we show how transfer learning can be leveraged to reduce the training cost by reusing knowledge from different systems and smaller system sizes.
articles.abstract_zh: 机器学习分析极大地扩展了变分量子蒙特卡罗（QMC）计算的准确性和范围，特别是在探索自旋系统表现出的多种量子现象时。然而，QMC 的可扩展性仍然受到其他几个瓶颈的影响，特别是与基于随机偏差的可观测值的实际评估相关的瓶颈，这是该方法的核心。在这里，我们展示了如何使用集合变压器架构来显着加速甚至绕过该步骤，特别是对于磁化功率等耗时的运算符。我们用一系列围绕具有长程相互作用的量子自旋系统构建的示例来说明该过程，并包括回归（用于预测可观测值）和分类（用于检测相变）。此外，我们还展示了如何利用迁移学习通过重用来自不同系统和较小系统规模的知识来降低培训成本。
authors: Manuel Gallego, Sebastián Roca-Jerat, David Zueco and Jesús Carrete

articles.abstract: Author(s): Taiki Shiotani, Takeshi Waki, Yoshikazu Tabata, Hiroyuki Nakamura, and István Kézsmárki Magnetic pyrochlore systems are a fertile ground for discovering unconventional electronic and magnetic states. In this study, the authors describe the first successful growth of single crystals of the site-ordered cubic Laves phase R InCo 4 ( R = Dy-Tm) containing Co pyrochlore and rare-earth face-centered cubic sublattices. They discovered that these materials are compensated ferrimagnets with Curie temperatures exceeding room temperature. Due to the interplay between Co-3 d and R -4 f electrons, these materials exhibit a variety of low-temperature magnetization anomalies, magnetic anisotropy, and compensation. Notably, DyInCo 4 exhibits the magnetization compensation near room temperature. These findings highlight the R InCo 4 family of magnetic pyrochlores as promising candidates for spintronics applications based on magnetization compensation. [Phys. Rev. Materials 9, 124411] Published Wed Dec 17, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Taiki Shiotani、Takeshi Waki、Yoshikazu Tabata、Hiroyuki Nakamura 和 István Kézsmárki 磁性烧绿石系统是发现非常规电子和磁态的沃土。在这项研究中，作者描述了首次成功生长含有钴烧绿石和稀土面心立方亚晶格的位点有序立方拉夫斯相 R InCo 4 (R = Dy-Tm) 单晶。他们发现这些材料是补偿亚铁磁体，居里温度超过室温。由于Co-3 d和R -4 f电子之间的相互作用，这些材料表现出多种低温磁化异常、磁各向异性和补偿性。值得注意的是，DyInCo 4 在接近室温时表现出磁化补偿。这些发现凸显了 R InCo 4 系列磁性烧绿石作为基于磁化补偿的自旋电子学应用的有希望的候选者。 [物理。 Rev. Materials 9, 124411] 2025 年 12 月 17 日星期三发布

articles.abstract_zh: 《自然》，在线发表：2025 年 12 月 17 日； doi:10.1038/s41586-025-09890-3 4D Nucleome Project 演示了使用基因组测定和计算方法来测量基因组折叠，然后根据 DNA 序列预测基因组结构，从而促进发现遗传变异（包括与疾病相关的变异）对基因组结构和功能的潜在影响。

articles.title: Astrocyte CCN1 stabilizes neural circuits in the adult brain

articles.title: Deformed States in Paraelectric and Ferroelectric Nematic Liquid Crystals
articles.title_zh: 顺电和铁电向列液晶的变形态
articles.abstract: Ground states of materials with orientational order ranging from solid ferromagnets and ferroelectrics to liquid crystals often contain spatially varying vector-like order parameter caused by inner factors such as the shape of building units or by the geometry of confinement. This review presents examples of how the shapes, chirality, and polarity of molecules and spatial confinement induce deformed equilibrium and polydomain states with parity breaking, splay, bend, and twist-bend deformations of the order parameter in paraelectric and ferroelectric nematic liquid crystals. Parity breaking results either from chirality of the constituent molecules, as a replacement of energetically costly splay and bend in paraelectric nematics, or in response to a depolarization field in the ferroelectric nematic. Both paraelectric and ferroelectric nematics exhibit a splay cancellation effect, in which the elastic and electrostatic energies of splay along one direction are reduced by an additional splay along orthogonal directions.
articles.abstract_zh: 从固体铁磁体、铁电体到液晶，具有取向序的材料的基态通常包含由内部因素（例如建筑单元的形状或约束的几何形状）引起的空间变化的类矢量序参数。本综述介绍了分子的形状、手性和极性以及空间限制如何引起变形平衡和多域态，以及顺电和铁电向列液晶中有序参数的奇偶校验破坏、展开、弯曲和扭转弯曲变形。宇称破缺要么是由组成分子的手性引起的，作为顺电向列中能量昂贵的张开和弯曲的替代，要么是对铁电向列中的去极化场的响应。顺电向列相和铁电向列相都表现出张开抵消效应，其中沿一个方向的张开的弹性能和静电能因沿正交方向的附加张开而减少。

articles.title: Deep finite temperature bootstrap
articles.title_zh: 深度有限温度自举
articles.abstract: Author(s): V. Niarchos, C. Papageorgakis, A. Stratoudakis, and M. Woolley The authors present a new numerical method for studying thermal quantum field theories, where ordinary techniques often struggle. The work is part of a larger ”bootstrap” effort in the theoretical physics community, where instead of solving a particular theory, the aim is to constrain the space of theories, in some cases enough to isolate a particular theory of interest. Here the constraints come from the Kubo-Martin-Schwinger condition and thermal dispersion relations. Additionally, connecting this work to progress in machine learning, the strategy uses a neural network to model the contribution from an infinite number of higher spin operators. [Phys. Rev. D 112, 126012] Published Tue Dec 16, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：V. Niarchos、C. Papageorgakis、A. Stratoudakis 和 M. Woolley 作者提出了一种新的数值方法来研究热量子场论，而普通技术在这方面经常遇到困难。这项工作是理论物理界更大的“引导”工作的一部分，其目的不是解决特定的理论，而是限制理论的空间，在某些情况下足以隔离感兴趣的特定理论。这里的约束来自 Kubo-Martin-Schwinger 条件和热色散关系。此外，将这项工作与机器学习的进展联系起来，该策略使用神经网络来模拟无限数量的高自旋算子的贡献。 [物理。 Rev. D 112, 126012] 2025 年 12 月 16 日星期二发布
authors: V. Niarchos, C. Papageorgakis, A. Stratoudakis, and M. Woolley

articles.title: Spin-lattice entanglement in ${\mathrm{CoPS}}_{3}$
articles.title_zh: ${\mathrm{CoPS}}_{3}$ 中的自旋晶格纠缠
articles.abstract: Author(s): Thuc T. Mai, Amber McCreary, K. F. Garrity, Rebecca L. Dally, Sambridhi Shah, Bryan C. Chakoumakos, Md Nasim Afroj Taj, Jeffrey W. Lynn, Michael A. McGuire, Benjamin S. Conner, Mona Zebarjadi, Janice L. Musfeldt, Angela R. Hight Walker, Rahul Rao, and Michael A. Susner The authors report here the most comprehensive study to date of the coupling between magnetism and the crystal lattice in CoPS 3 , a magnetic van der Waals material with high spin-orbit coupling and unquenched orbital moments. Employing a suite of experimental techniques, they uncover unambiguous signatures of spin-lattice coupling: magnetostriction and magnon-phonon hybridization. These findings illuminate the intricate interplay between the spin, orbital, and lattice degrees of freedom in this quasi-two-dimensional system. [Phys. Rev. B 112, 214435] Published Tue Dec 16, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Thuc T. Mai、Amber McCreary、K. F. Garrity、Rebecca L. Dally、Sambridhi Shah、Bryan C. Chakoumakos、Md Nasim Afroj Taj、Jeffrey W. Lynn、Michael A. McGuire、Benjamin S. Conner、Mona Zebarjadi、Janice L. Musfeldt、Angela R. Hight Walker、Rahul Rao 和 Michael A. Susner 作者在此报告了迄今为止关于 CoPS 3 中磁性与晶格之间耦合的最全面的研究，CoPS 3 是一种具有高自旋轨道耦合和未淬火轨道矩的磁性范德华材料。他们采用一套实验技术，揭示了自旋晶格耦合的明确特征：磁致伸缩和磁振子-声子杂化。这些发现阐明了这个准二维系统中自旋、轨道和晶格自由度之间复杂的相互作用。 [物理。 Rev. B 112, 214435] 2025 年 12 月 16 日星期二发布
authors: Thuc T. Mai, Amber McCreary, K. F. Garrity, Rebecca L. Dally, Sambridhi Shah, Bryan C. Chakoumakos, Md Nasim Afroj Taj, Jeffrey W. Lynn, Michael A. McGuire, Benjamin S. Conner, Mona Zebarjadi, Janice L. Musfeldt, Angela R. Hight Walker, Rahul Rao, and Michael A. Susner

articles.title: Electronic structure of monolayer ${\mathrm{CrTe}}_{2}$: An antiferromagnetic two-dimensional van der Waals material
articles.title_zh: 单层${\mathrm{CrTe}}_{2}$的电子结构：反铁磁二维范德华材料
articles.abstract: Author(s): Olivia Armitage, Naina Kushwaha, Akhil Rajan, Luke C. Rhodes, Sebastian Buchberger, Bruno Kenichi Saika, Shu Mo, Matthew D. Watson, Phil D. C. King, and Peter Wahl By combining angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy with quasiparticle interference imaging, the authors establish here the electronic structure and magnetic ground state of monolayer CrTe 2 . Comparison with density functional theory calculations shows that inclusion of a moderate on-site Coulomb interaction is required to accurately capture the band structure. The work demonstrates how momentum- and real-space spectroscopies together resolve the electronic structure, magnetism and correlations in two-dimensional van der Waals materials. [Phys. Rev. B 112, 245416] Published Tue Dec 16, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Olivia Armitage、Naina Kushwaha、Akhil Rajan、Luke C. Rhodes、Sebastian Buchberger、Bruno Kenichi Saika、Shu Mo、Matthew D. Watson、Phil D. C. King 和 Peter Wahl 通过将角分辨光电子能谱与准粒子干涉成像相结合，作者在此建立了单层 CrTe 2 的电子结构和磁性基态。与密度泛函理论计算的比较表明，需要包含适度的现场库仑相互作用才能准确捕获能带结构。这项工作展示了动量光谱和实空间光谱如何共同解析二维范德华材料中的电子结构、磁性和相关性。 [物理。 Rev. B 112, 245416] 2025 年 12 月 16 日星期二发布

articles.title: LLM-guided chemical process optimization with a multi-agent approach
articles.title_zh: 法学硕士指导的多代理方法化学工艺优化
articles.abstract: Chemical process optimization is crucial to maximize production efficiency and economic performance. Optimization algorithms, including gradient-based solvers, numerical methods, and parameter grid searches, become impractical when operating constraints are ill-defined or unavailable, requiring engineers to rely on subjective heuristics to estimate feasible parameter ranges. To address this constraint definition bottleneck, we present a multi-agent framework of large language model (LLM) agents that autonomously infer operating constraints from minimal process descriptions, then collaboratively guide optimization using the inferred constraints. Our AutoGen-based agentic framework employs OpenAI’s o3 model, with specialized agents for constraint generation, parameter validation, simulation execution, and optimization guidance. Through two phases: (i) autonomous constraint generation using embedded domain knowledge, and (ii) iterative multi-agent optimization, the framework eliminates the need for predefined operational bounds. Validated on the hydrodealkylation process across cost, yield, and yield-to-cost ratio metrics, the framework demonstrated competitive performance with conventional optimization methods while achieving a 31-fold reduction in wall-time relative to grid search, converging in under 20 min and requiring far fewer iterations to converge. Beyond computational efficiency, the framework’s reasoning-guided search demonstrates sophisticated process understanding, correctly identifying utility trade-offs, and applying domain-informed heuristics. Unlike conventional optimization methods like Bayesian optimization that require predefined constraints, our approach uniquely combines autonomous constraint generation with interpretable, reasoning-guided parameter exploration. Reproducibility analysis across five independent trials demonstrates consistent convergence behavior, while model comparison reveals that reasoning-capable LLM architectures (o3, o1) are essential for successful optimization, with standard models failing to converge effectively. This approach shows significant potential for optimization scenarios where operational constraints are poorly characterized or unavailable, particularly for emerging processes and retrofit applications.
articles.abstract_zh: 化学工艺优化对于最大化生产效率和经济效益至关重要。当操作约束不明确或不可用时，优化算法（包括基于梯度的求解器、数值方法和参数网格搜索）变得不切实际，需要工程师依靠主观启发法来估计可行的参数范围。为了解决这个约束定义瓶颈，我们提出了一个大型语言模型（LLM）代理的多代理框架，该框架可以从最小的流程描述中自主推断操作约束，然后使用推断的约束协作指导优化。我们基于 AutoGen 的代理框架采用 OpenAI 的 o3 模型，具有用于约束生成、参数验证、模拟执行和优化指导的专用代理。通过两个阶段：（i）使用嵌入式领域知识自主约束生成，以及（ii）迭代多智能体优化，该框架消除了对预定义操作边界的需要。该框架在加氢脱烷基化过程的成本、收率和收率成本比指标上进行了验证，显示出与传统优化方法相比具有竞争力的性能，同时相对于网格搜索，壁时间减少了 31 倍，在 20 分钟内收敛，并且需要更少的迭代来收敛。除了计算效率之外，该框架的推理引导搜索还展示了复杂的流程理解、正确识别效用权衡以及应用领域信息启发法。与需要预定义约束的贝叶斯优化等传统优化方法不同，我们的方法独特地将自主约束生成与可解释的、推理引导的参数探索结合起来。五个独立试验的再现性分析表明了一致的收敛行为，而模型比较表明，具有推理能力的 LLM 架构（o3、o1）对于成功优化至关重要，而标准模型无法有效收敛。这种方法在操作约束特征不明确或不可用的优化场景中显示出巨大的潜力，特别是对于新兴流程和改造应用。
authors: Tong Zeng, Srivathsan Badrinarayanan, Janghoon Ock, Cheng-Kai Lai and Amir Barati Farimani

articles.title: Domain-randomised instance-segmentation benchmark for soot in PIV images
articles.title_zh: PIV 图像中烟灰的域随机实例分割基准
articles.abstract: Access to high-level statistical information from scientific image-based diagnostics is facilitated by the capacity to segment quantity-of-interest (QoI) signal accurately from measurement noise and interferences. In particular under conditions with diverse nuisance signatures, deep learning (DL) pipelines can outperform algorithm-based computer vision (CV) strategies and simultaneously enhance domain-invariance. DL-pipelines aim to overcome the generalisation bottleneck through augmentations and learnable parameters, supplemented by huge amounts of data. Yet, manual pixel-accurate annotation for scientific tasks is prohibitively expensive and the robustness of the trained models is often impeded by the underlying narrow and domain-specific set of training data. In the current study, a previously developed domain-randomised pipeline for automatic annotation and synthetic training data generation is benchmarked using a physics-aware composite score. An ablation study for background variance, QoI placement strategy and QoI object source proportions is conducted. The benchmark, consisting of 72 synthetic training data generation recipes, highlights the optimal set of domain-randomisation parameters to strike the balance between domain-invariance and segmentation accuracy. Synthetic training datasets with a balanced mix of QoI objects, fused onto realistic background instances, are found to provide the most accurate models for segmentation. The best model is subsequently used for the inference on semantically challenging Mie scattering images containing particle-image velocimetry (PIV) tracer particles and soot filaments. The model’s ability to detect soot structures with good accuracy is demonstrated and high-level soot filament area and contour statistics (e.g. curvature and fractal dimension) are used to delineate the effects of turbulent flow on soot filament structures. The present study highlights key parameters to tune domain randomisation strategies for DL-training pipelines and the pipeline usability and transferability is proved for autonomous semi-supervised learning. This eases access to high-level statistics in scientific image-based diagnostics.
articles.abstract_zh: 从测量噪声和干扰中准确分割感兴趣数量 (QoI) 信号的能力有助于从基于图像的科学诊断中获取高级统计信息。特别是在具有不同滋扰特征的条件下，深度学习 (DL) 管道可以超越基于算法的计算机视觉 (CV) 策略，同时增强域不变性。深度学习管道旨在通过增强和可学习参数并辅以大量数据来克服泛化瓶颈。然而，针对科学任务的手动像素精确注释成本高昂，并且训练模型的鲁棒性常常受到底层狭窄且特定领域的训练数据集的阻碍。在当前的研究中，之前开发的用于自动注释和合成训练数据生成的领域随机管道使用物理感知综合得分进行了基准测试。对背景方差、QoI 放置策略和 QoI 对象源比例进行消融研究。该基准由 72 个合成训练数据生成方案组成，突出显示了最佳的域随机化参数集，以在域不变性和分割精度之间取得平衡。研究发现，具有均衡的 QoI 对象混合的合成训练数据集，融合到真实的背景实例上，可以提供最准确的分割模型。最佳模型随后用于对包含粒子图像测速 (PIV) 示踪粒子和烟灰丝的语义上具有挑战性的米氏散射图像进行推理。该模型能够以良好的精度检测烟灰结构，并使用高级烟灰丝面积和轮廓统计数据（例如曲率和分形维数）来描绘湍流对烟灰丝结构的影响。本研究强调了调整 DL 训练管道的域随机化策略的关键参数，并且证明了管道的可用性和可转移性用于自主半监督学习。这可以方便地访问基于科学图像的诊断中的高级统计数据。
authors: Basil Jose, Klaus Peter Geigle and Fabian Hampp

articles.title: Magnetic control of quantum vacuum friction near a graphene sheet
articles.title_zh: 石墨烯片附近量子真空摩擦的磁控制
articles.abstract: Author(s): Kaipeng Liu, Shiwei Dai, and Lixin Ge The authors investigate here quantum vacuum friction acting on a rotating nanosphere near a graphene sheet and demonstrate that the friction force can be substantially tuned by a magnetic field. This tunability originates from the mode coupling between graphene’s magnetoplasmon polaritons and the localized surface phonon polaritons in nanospheres. Interestingly, the authors reveal that the axial Casimir force—a dissipationless friction—exhibits quantized steplike features as the magnetic field and/or the chemical potential increases. This phenomenon is attributed to the quantum Hall effect of graphene at low temperatures. [Phys. Rev. B 112, 235412] Published Fri Dec 12, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Kaipeng Liu、Shiwei Dai 和 Lixin Ge 作者在此研究了作用在石墨烯片附近旋转纳米球上的量子真空摩擦，并证明摩擦力可以通过磁场进行大幅调节。这种可调谐性源于石墨烯的磁等离子极化激元与纳米球中的局域表面声子极化激元之间的模式耦合。有趣的是，作者揭示了轴向卡西米尔力（一种无耗散摩擦力）随着磁场和/或化学势的增加而表现出量子化的阶梯状特征。这种现象归因于石墨烯在低温下的量子霍尔效应。 [物理。 Rev. B 112, 235412] 2025 年 12 月 12 日星期五发布
authors: Kaipeng Liu, Shiwei Dai, and Lixin Ge

articles.title: Lessons learned in linking PROTACs from discovery to the clinic
articles.title_zh: 将 PROTAC 从发现到临床联系起来的经验教训
articles.abstract: Nature Reviews Chemistry, Published online: 12 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s41570-025-00784-6 Proteolysis targeting chimeras (PROTACs) are an emerging platform in drug discovery with the potential to unlock novel pharmacology and tackle undruggable targets. This Review highlights learnings from the first cohort of clinical-stage PROTACs, which use short, ring-rich linkers, often complemented with one basic centre, to achieve good bioavailability and metabolic stability.
articles.abstract_zh: Nature Reviews Chemistry，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 12 日； doi:10.1038/s41570-025-00784-6 蛋白水解靶向嵌合体 (PROTAC) 是药物发现的新兴平台，具有解锁新药理学和解决不可成药靶标的潜力。本综述重点介绍了第一批临床阶段 PROTAC 的经验教训，这些 PROTAC 使用短的、富含环的接头，通常辅以一个基本中心，以实现良好的生物利用度和代谢稳定性。

articles.title: Interface-engineered oxygen vacancy channels in epitaxial brownmillerite manganite films
articles.title_zh: 外延褐针石亚锰酸盐薄膜中的界面工程氧空位通道
articles.abstract: Author(s): Qiming Lv, Feng Jin, Mingqiang Gu, Kunjie Dai, Qing Wang, Zhengguo Liang, Huan Ye, Jinfeng Zhang, Zixun Zhang, Jingdi Lu, Min Ge, Lingfei Wang, and Wenbin Wu This study demonstrates precise control over oxygen vacancy channel (OVC) orientations in brownmillerite La 0 . 67 Ca 0 . 33 MnO 2 . 5 films through strain engineering achieved by tuning the crystallographic orientation of NdGaO 3 substrates. Horizontal OVCs yield atomically sharp interfaces, whereas vertical ones develop interfacial layers to maintain oxygen connectivity. The films undergo reversible topotactic transitions between brownmillerite and perovskite phases, accompanied by a transformation between half-metallic ferromagnetism and insulating antiferromagnetism. The study elucidates how strain states, Mn valence, and Mn–O hybridization govern interfacial and electronic structures, providing design strategies for oxide electronics with tunable functionalities. [Phys. Rev. Materials 9, 124407] Published Fri Dec 12, 2025

articles.title: Mammo-MX: an x-ray mammography dataset for computer-aided diagnosis of breast cancer
articles.title_zh: Mammo-MX：用于乳腺癌计算机辅助诊断的 X 射线乳房 X 线摄影数据集
articles.abstract: Breast cancer has been the leading cause of cancer-related deaths among Mexican women since 2006, underscoring the need for improved diagnostic tools and accessible datasets for artificial intelligence (AI). We introduce Mammo-MX, a publicly available large-scale mammography dataset specifically focused on Mexican patients, addressing a critical gap in well-labeled data for deep learning applications. The dataset was acquired between 2023-2024 at the Jalisco Breast Clinic using a HOLOGIC® Selenia Dimensions full-field digital mammography system, ensuring high-quality imaging. After rigorous curation, Mammo-MX comprises 13,659 mammograms from 3,368 patients with standard craniocaudal (CC) and mediolateral-oblique (MLO) views. Each study was annotated by expert radiologists according to the BI-RADS classification system, and it includes breast density assessments and extensive acquisition metadata. By offering a robust, well-labeled, and freely accessible dataset, Mammo-MX fills a void in current resources, enabling the development of AI models tailored to the Mexican population while also strengthening the global diversity and generalizability of computer-aided diagnostic tools for breast cancer.
articles.abstract_zh: 自 2006 年以来，乳腺癌一直是墨西哥女性癌症相关死亡的主要原因，这凸显了改进诊断工具和可访问的人工智能 (AI) 数据集的必要性。我们推出了 Mammo-MX，这是一个专门针对墨西哥患者的公开大型乳房 X 线摄影数据集，解决了深度学习应用中标记良好的数据的关键缺口。该数据集是 2023 年至 2024 年在哈利斯科州乳腺诊所使用 HOLOGIC® Selenia Dimensions 全视野数字乳房 X 线摄影系统获取的，确保了高质量的成像。经过严格管理，Mammo-MX 包含来自 3,368 名患者的 13,659 张乳房 X 光照片，具有标准头尾 (CC) 和内外侧斜 (MLO) 视图。每项研究均由放射科医生专家根据 BI-RADS 分类系统进行注释，其中包括乳腺密度评估和广泛的采集元数据。通过提供强大、标记良好且可免费访问的数据集，Mammo-MX 填补了当前资源的空白，从而能够开发适合墨西哥人口的人工智能模型，同时还加强了乳腺癌计算机辅助诊断工具的全球多样性和通用性。
authors: Blanca Olivia Murillo-Ortiz, Luis Carlos Padierna, Íñigo Alonso Perea-Campos, Luis Fernando Parra-Sánchez, Sergio Meza-Chavolla and Samuel Rivera Rivera

articles.title: SBDFNet: a deep learning-based multiclass segmentation method via boundary distance fields
articles.title_zh: SBDFNet：一种基于深度学习的边界距离场多类分割方法
articles.abstract: With the development of artificial intelligence in the field of medical imaging, medical image segmentation technology has played an important role in clinical practice. Extracting the morphological and structural information of lesions from medical images can provide important basis for disease diagnosis and treatment decision-making, and effectively promote the quantitative evaluation and progression monitoring of clinical diseases. However, the complexity and diversity of lesions make it difficult to design and optimize segmentation algorithms, especially for lesions with complex boundaries. To solve this problem, this study proposed a segmentation network driven by the boundary distance field of the segmentation map, called SBDFNet. The network gives the boundary distance information of the segmentation map and combines the distance loss function to effectively improve the accuracy of lesion boundary segmentation. Secondly, a new residual multi-scale feature fusion and spatial aggregation module is designed to enhance the perception of image detail features and spatial features through multi-scale encoding. In addition, a side-out supervision mechanism is constructed to supervise the prediction information of the intermediate layer and assist in reconstructing accurate segmentation results. Finally, the morphological opening and closing operations are used to focus on the segmentation of connected and discrete regions, so that the model can fully perceive the global and local information of the lesion and improve the overall segmentation effect. The SBDFNet method is comprehensively evaluated on four datasets: a tumor and liver automatic segmentation, LiTs, BraTs2019, and Spine, verifying its reliability and effectiveness. The proposed approach exhibits superior performance, reaching an intersection over union of 93.757% and a dice similarity coefficient of 96.7635%, which highlights its effectiveness in the segmentation task.
articles.abstract_zh: 随着人工智能在医学影像领域的发展，医学图像分割技术在临床实践中发挥了重要作用。从医学图像中提取病灶的形态和结构信息可以为疾病诊断和治疗决策提供重要依据，有效促进临床疾病的定量评估和进展监测。然而，病灶的复杂性和多样性使得分割算法的设计和优化变得困难，特别是对于边界复杂的病灶。为了解决这个问题，本研究提出了一种由分割图的边界距离场驱动的分割网络，称为SBDFNet。该网络给出了分割图的边界距离信息，并结合距离损失函数，有效提高了病灶边界分割的准确性。其次，设计了一种新的残差多尺度特征融合和空间聚合模块，通过多尺度编码增强图像细节特征和空间特征的感知。此外，还构建了侧向监督机制来监督中间层的预测信息并协助重建准确的分割结果。最后利用形态学开闭运算重点关注连通区域和离散区域的分割，使模型能够充分感知病灶的全局和局部信息，提高整体分割效果。 SBDFNet方法在肿瘤和肝脏自动分割、LiTs、BraTs2019和Spine这四个数据集上进行了综合评估，验证了其可靠性和有效性。所提出的方法表现出优越的性能，达到了 93.757% 的并集交集和 96.7635% 的骰子相似系数，这凸显了其在分割任务中的有效性。
authors: Meng Li, Juntong Yun, Dingxi Liu, Daixiang Jiang, Hanlin Xiong, Du Jiang, Shunbo Hu, Rong Liu and Gongfa Li

articles.title: A super-conducting diode with ultimate efficiency and noise resilience at 77 K
articles.title_zh: 77 K 下具有终极效率和噪声恢复能力的超导二极管
articles.abstract: Nature Physics, Published online: 11 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s41567-025-03118-x An electrical method is shown to reliably introduce nonreciprocal behaviour across a Josephson junction made of high-temperature cuprate superconductors, which then, under microwave irradiation, forms a ‘quantum superconducting diode’. The device is magnetic-field-free, works at a temperature of 77 K with a diode efficiency of 100%, and, owing to Shapiro steps that quantize the output voltage, has robust noise-filtering.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然物理学》，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 11 日； doi:10.1038/s41567-025-03118-x 一种电气方法被证明可以在由高温铜酸盐超导体制成的约瑟夫森结上可靠地引入不可逆行为，然后在微波照射下形成“量子超导二极管”。该器件无磁场，工作温度为 77 K，二极管效率为 100%，并且由于夏皮罗步骤可量化输出电压，因此具有强大的噪声滤波器

articles.abstract: Author(s): S. Pylypenko, M. Winter, U. K. Rößler, D. Pohl, R. Kyrychenko, M. C. Rahn, B. Achinuq, J. R. Bollard, P. Vir, G. van der Laan, T. Hesjedal, J. Schultz, B. Rellinghaus, C. Felser, and A. Lubk Disordered glassy states have been observed in a wide range of 2D systems, such as colloidal nanoparticle or fluxon lattices, exhibiting a characteristic nonlinear response to external stimuli. The authors report here on the observation of a glassy 2D lattice of nontopological magnetic bubbles in the noncentrosymmetric ferrimagnetic alloy Mn 1 . 4 PtSn. The quenched structural disorder, introduced by driving the system through various magnetic phase transitions, is characterized by a high density of lattice defects and a highly inhomogeneous motion of the bubbles in external magnetic fields. [Phys. Rev. B 112, 214424] Published Thu Dec 11, 2025

articles.title: Colloquium : The cosmic dipole anomaly
articles.title_zh: 座谈会：宇宙偶极子异常
articles.abstract: Author(s): Nathan Secrest, Sebastian von Hausegger, Mohamed Rameez, Roya Mohayaee, and Subir Sarkar The cosmological principle, which states that the Universe must be statistically isotropic and homogeneous on large scales, is a foundational principle of the standard model of cosmology, known as lambda cold dark matter ( Λ CDM). The validity of this principle can be tested by assessing the compatibility of a dipole anisotropy in the large-scale distribution of matter with the dipole observed in the cosmic microwave background, interpreted in the Λ CDM model as due to our local peculiar motion. This Colloquium describes the methodology for such a test and presents its outcome based on the analysis of recent large catalogs of radio galaxies and quasars, revealing a significant inconsistency between the two dipoles. The authors review these recent findings, as well as potential biases, systematic issues, and alternate interpretations, and discuss how this anomaly could challenge the standard description of our Universe based on the Λ CDM model. [Rev. Mod. Phys. 97, 041001] Published Thu Dec 11, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Nathan Secrest、Sebastian von Hausegger、Mohamed Rameez、Roya Mohayaee 和 Subir Sarkar 宇宙学原理指出，宇宙在大尺度上必须在统计上各向同性且均匀，是宇宙学标准模型（称为 lambda 冷暗物质（Λ CDM））的基本原理。这一原理的有效性可以通过评估物质大规模分布中的偶极子各向异性与在宇宙微波背景中观察到的偶极子的兼容性来测试，在Λ CDM模型中将其解释为由于我们局部的奇特运动。本次研讨会描述了此类测试的方法，并根据最近对射电星系和类星体的大型目录的分析介绍了其结果，揭示了两个偶极子之间的显着不一致。作者回顾了这些最近的发现，以及潜在的偏见、系统问题和替代解释，并讨论了这种异常现象如何挑战基于 Λ CDM 模型的宇宙标准描述。 [牧师。模组。物理。 97, 041001] 发布于 2025 年 12 月 11 日星期四
authors: Nathan Secrest, Sebastian von Hausegger, Mohamed Rameez, Roya Mohayaee, and Subir Sarkar

articles.title: Searching superhard C and ${\mathrm{B}}_{\mathrm{x}}{\mathrm{C}}_{\mathrm{y}}{\mathrm{N}}_{\mathrm{z}}$ via full-space inverse design approach
articles.title_zh: 通过全空间逆设计方法搜索超硬 C 和 ${\mathrm{B}}_{\mathrm{x}}{\mathrm{C}}_{\mathrm{y}}{\mathrm{N}}_{\mathrm{z}}$
articles.abstract: Author(s): Kaiwei Feng, Guanjian Cheng, and Wan-Jian Yin The authors have developed a full-space inverse design strategy powered by machine-learning force fields to accelerate the discovery of superhard materials. Using the D 3 REAM framework, they identify two carbon allotropes and three B–C–N compounds with exceptional mechanical performance, including elastic moduli that surpass diamond along certain crystallographic directions. By integrating active learning, global optimization, and first-principles validation, their approach efficiently navigates vast configurational spaces and reveals that incorporating up to 40% B–N enables structurally diverse and superhard phases. This work demonstrates a robust pathway toward data-driven exploration and design of next-generation ultrahard materials. [Phys. Rev. Materials 9, 123603] Published Thu Dec 11, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Kaiwei Feng、Guanjian Cheng 和 Wan-Jian Yin 作者开发了一种由机器学习力场驱动的全空间逆向设计策略，以加速超硬材料的发现。利用 D 3 REAM 框架，他们识别出两种碳同素异形体和三种 B-C-N 化合物，它们具有卓越的机械性能，包括沿某些晶体方向超越金刚石的弹性模量。通过集成主动学习、全局优化和第一性原理验证，他们的方法有效地导航了巨大的配置空间，并揭示了合并高达 40% B-N 可以实现结构多样化和超硬相。这项工作展示了数据驱动的下一代超硬材料探索和设计的稳健途径。 [物理。 Rev. articles.abstract_zh: 《自然机器智能》，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 10 日； doi:10.1038/s42256-025-01148-x Exai-1 是一种无细胞 RNA 基础模型，集成了序列、结构和表达特征，通过对噪声数据进行去噪、扩充有限数据集和提高癌症检测模型的通用性来推进液体活检诊断。

articles.title: Symmetry oscillation sensitivity to SU(2)-symmetry breaking in quantum mixtures
articles.title_zh: 量子混合物中 SU(2) 对称性破缺的对称振荡敏感性
articles.abstract: Author(s): S. Musolino, M. Albert, P. Vignolo, and A. Minguzzi The authors study the time modulation of the momentum distributions of one-dimensional Bose-Bose mixtures with strong repulsive interactions, described via SU(2)-symmetry-breaking Hamiltonians. They show that the phenomenon of symmetry oscillations is not restricted to a specific model or fine-tuned parameters, but instead constitutes a robust and universal dynamical feature of multicomponent strongly interacting one-dimensional quantum mixtures. [Phys. Rev. A 112, 063308] Published Wed Dec 10, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：S. Musolino、M. Albert、P. Vignolo 和 A. Minguzzi 作者研究了具有强排斥相互作用的一维 Bose-Bose 混合物动量分布的时间调制，通过 SU(2) 对称破缺哈密顿量进行描述。他们表明，对称振荡现象并不局限于特定的模型或微调参数，而是构成了多组分强相互作用的一维量子混合物的鲁棒且普遍的动力学特征。 [物理。 Rev. A 112, 063308] 2025 年 12 月 10 日星期三发布
authors: S. Musolino, M. Albert, P. Vignolo, and A. Minguzzi

articles.title: New family of square net materials: Rare-earth diantimonides
articles.title_zh: 方网材料新家族：稀土双锑化物
articles.abstract: Author(s): Matteo Michiardi, Fabian Arnold, Ganapathy Vaitheeswaran, Ryan P. Day, Karl Fischer, Gummula Shwetha, Venkatakrishnan Kanchana, Davide Curcio, Klara Volckaert, Marco Bianchi, Ilya S. Elfimov, Bo Brummerstedt Iversen, Andrea Damascelli, and Philip Hofmann Square-net Dirac semimetals like ZrSiS and SrMnBi₂ have attracted intense interest for their topologically protected electronic states and exceptional transport properties. The authors introduce rare-earth diantimonides (RSb₂) as a distinct new family that breaks new ground in this evolving field. Unlike the well studied tetragonal P4/nmm and I4/mmm families, RSb₂ compounds crystallize in an orthorhombic Cmca structure featuring staggered antimony square nets. Through comprehensive spectroscopic studies of LaSb₂, they reveal how this unique structure generates a double nodal-line topology with graphene-comparable Fermi velocities. The broken local symmetry further enables a Rashba-2 effect, providing layer-dependent spin polarization within a centrosymmetric bulk. This discovery significantly expands the square-net materials landscape, establishing RSb₂ as a versatile platform for exploring novel topological phenomena and potential spintronic applications. [Phys. Rev. Materials 9, 124201] Published Tue Dec 09, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Matteo Michiardi、Fabian Arnold、Ganapathy Vaitheeswaran、Ryan P. Day、Karl Fischer、Gummula Shwetha、Venkatakrishnan Kanchana、Davide Curcio、Klara Volckaert、Marco Bianchi、Ilya S. Elfimov、Bo Brummerstedt Iversen、Andrea Damascelli 和 Philip Hofmann 方网狄拉克半金属ZrSiS 和 SrMnBi2 等材料因其受拓扑保护的电子态和卓越的输运特性而引起了人们的浓厚兴趣。作者介绍了稀土二锑 (RSb2) 作为一个独特的新家族，在这个不断发展的领域开辟了新天地。与经过充分研究的四方 P4/nmm 和 I4/mmm 族不同，RSb2 化合物以交错锑方网为特征的斜方 Cmca 结构结晶。通过对 LaSb2 的全面光谱研究，他们揭示了这种独特的结构如何产生具有与石墨烯相当的费米速度的双节线拓扑。破缺的局部对称性进一步实现了 Rashba-2 效应，在中心对称体中提供层相关的自旋极化。这一发现显着扩展了方网材料领域，将 RSb2 建立为探索新颖拓扑现象和潜在自旋电子应用的多功能平台。 [物理。 Rev. Materials 9, 124201] 2025 年 12 月 9 日星期二发布
authors: Matteo Michiardi, Fabian Arnold, Ganapathy Vaitheeswaran, Ryan P. Day, Karl Fischer, Gummula Shwetha, Venkatakrishnan Kanchana, Davide Curcio, Klara Volckaert, Marco Bianchi, Ilya S. Elfimov, Bo Brummerstedt Iversen, Andrea Damascelli, and Philip Hofmann
articles.journal: Recent Articles in Phys. Rev. Materials

articles.title: Giant shift current in electrically tunable superlattice bilayer graphene
articles.title_zh: 电可调超晶格双层石墨烯中的巨移电流
articles.abstract: Author(s): Nabil Atlam, Swati Chaudhary, Arpit Raj, Matthew Matzelle, Barun Ghosh, Gregory A. Fiete, and Arun Bansil The bulk photogalvanic effect generates direct electrical current from incident light. Here, the authors demonstrate that a bilayer graphene film with an imprinted electric superlattice potential can produce a large and tunable photogalvanic current that surpasses previous predictions for twisted bilayer graphene. This response occurs in the far-infrared regime and it can be electrically controlled by tuning both the displacement field and the superlattice moiré potential strength, opening new pathways for applications including infrared sensors and detectors. [Phys. Rev. B 112, 245409] Published Tue Dec 09, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Nabil Atlam、Swati Chaudhary、Arpit Raj、Matthew Matzelle、Barun Ghosh、Gregory A. Fiete 和 Arun Bansil 体光电池效应从入射光中产生直接电流。在这里，作者证明，具有压印电超晶格电势的双层石墨烯薄膜可以产生大且可调的光电流，超过了之前对扭曲双层石墨烯的预测。这种响应发生在远红外区域，并且可以通过调节位移场和超晶格莫尔势强度进行电控制，为包括红外传感器和探测器在内的应用开辟了新的途径。 [物理。 Rev. B 112, 245409] 于 2025 年 12 月 9 日星期二发布
authors: Nabil Atlam, Swati Chaudhary, Arpit Raj, Matthew Matzelle, Barun Ghosh, Gregory A. Fiete, and Arun Bansil

articles.abstract: Author(s): Di Yue, Hongya Wang, Guangyi Huang, Yadong Jiang, Zhiwei Huang, Pengyu Zheng, Yichen Song, Shuaifei Guo, Ning Tian, Mingyan Luo, Zhongxun Guo, Hengsheng Luo, Chuanying Xi, Guangli Kuang, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Zhimou Chen, Xi Lin, Jing Wang, Changlin Zheng, Xiaofeng Jin, Wei Ruan, and Yuanbo Zhang Ultrathin bismuth films grown on boron nitride host a high-mobility two-dimensional electron system dominated by spin-split surface states, revealing strong spin-orbit effects that could potentially enable stable, spin-based quantum behaviors at elevated temperatures. [Phys. Rev. X 15, 041047] Published Tue Dec 09, 2025

articles.title: Kinetic magnetism in the crossover between the square and triangular lattice Fermi-Hubbard models
articles.title_zh: 方格和三角晶格费米-哈伯德模型之间交叉的动磁力
articles.abstract: Author(s): Darren Pereira and Erich J. Mueller The ground state of the hard-core Fermi-Hubbard model with a single hole (and otherwise half-filled) is a ferromagnet on the square lattice, but an antiferromagnet on the triangular lattice, as those spin patterns minimize the kinetic energy of the hole. What is the magnetic behavior as one interpolates between these two geometries? Using a sophisticated quantum Monte Carlo algorithm, the authors determine here the magnetic correlations as the lattice is varied. Their calculations are performed in the thermodynamic limit and at temperatures comparable to current cold-atom experiments. They find a magnetic crossover between the two geometries, and calculate signatures of it that are observable in these experiments. [Phys. Rev. B 112, 245120] Published Mon Dec 08, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Darren Pereira 和 Erich J. Mueller 具有单孔（或半填充）的硬核费米-哈伯德模型的基态是方形晶格上的铁磁体，但三角形晶格上的反铁磁体，因为这些自旋模式使空穴的动能最小化。当在这两种几何形状之间进行插值时，磁性行为是什么？作者使用复杂的量子蒙特卡罗算法，确定了晶格变化时的磁相关性。他们的计算是在热力学极限和与当前冷原子实验相当的温度下进行的。他们发现了两种几何形状之间的磁交叉，并计算了在这些实验中可观察到的特征。 [物理。修订版 B 112, 245120] 于 2025 年 12 月 8 日星期一发布
authors: Darren Pereira and Erich J. Mueller

articles.title: Concurrence of large anomalous Hall and topological Hall effects in ferromagnet ${\mathrm{Mn}}_{5}{\mathrm{Ge}}_{3}$
articles.title_zh: 铁磁体中大反常霍尔效应和拓扑霍尔效应的同时存在${\mathrm{Mn}}_{5}{\mathrm{Ge}}_{3}$
articles.abstract: Author(s): Junfa Lin, Jianfeng Guo, Huan Wang, Xiaoyan Wang, Sheng Xu, Xiangyu Zeng, Yu Zhang, Zhihai Cheng, and Tian-Long Xia Novel Hall phenomena are observed in centrosymmetric Mn5Ge3 ferromagnet. Contrary to the typical behavior observed in most ferromagnets, the large anomalous Hall effect is strongly suppressed at low temperatures, giving way to a dominant ordinary Hall effect that is well described by a two-band model. This unique temperature dependence suggests a competition between intrinsic and skew-scattering mechanisms. Furthermore, this work identifies two distinct origins of the topological Hall effect: one arising from non-collinear spin textures and the other from skyrmion bubbles. These findings offer new insights into both the anomalous and topological Hall effects. [Phys. Rev. Materials 9, 124403] Published Fri Dec 05, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：林俊发、郭建峰、王欢、王晓燕、徐胜、曾翔宇、张宇、程志海、夏天龙 中心对称 Mn5Ge3 铁磁体中观察到的小说霍尔现象。与大多数铁磁体中观察到的典型行为相反，大的反常霍尔效应在低温下被强烈抑制，让位于由两带模型很好描述的占主导地位的普通霍尔效应。这种独特的温度依赖性表明内在机制和斜散射机制之间存在竞争。此外，这项工作还确定了拓扑霍尔效应的两个不同起源：一个来自非共线自旋纹理，另一个来自斯格明子气泡。这些发现为异常霍尔效应和拓扑霍尔效应提供了新的见解。 [物理。 Rev. Materials 9, 124403] 2025 年 12 月 5 日星期五发布
authors: Junfa Lin, Jianfeng Guo, Huan Wang, Xiaoyan Wang, Sheng Xu, Xiangyu Zeng, Yu Zhang, Zhihai Cheng, and Tian-Long Xia

articles.title: Mirage sources and large TeV halo-pulsar offsets: Exploring the parameter space
articles.title_zh: 海市蜃楼源和大型 TeV 晕脉冲星偏移：探索参数空间
articles.abstract: Author(s): Yiwei Bao, Ruo-Yu Liu, Gwenael Giacinti, Hai-Ming Zhang, and Yang Chen GeV gamma-ray emission is frequently observed both at large angular separation from pulsars and are not always centered around these pulsars. Using GPU-acceleration monte-carlo simulations, the authors provide a compelling explanation that the propogation of 100 GeV electrons that produce these gamma-rays in the turbulent interstellar magnetic field both leads to off-center peaks and wide separation, e.g., a gamma-ray mirage. These mirages can help constrain the properties of the interstellar magnetic field. [Phys. Rev. D 112, 123017] Published Fri Dec 05, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Yiwei Bao、Ruo-Yu Liu、Gwenael Giacinti、Hai-Ming Zhang 和 Yang Chen GeV 伽马射线发射经常在与脉冲星的大角距处观察到，并且并不总是以这些脉冲星为中心。作者使用 GPU 加速蒙特卡罗模拟提供了令人信服的解释，即在湍流星际磁场中产生这些伽马射线的 100 GeV 电子的传播会导致偏离中心的峰值和宽间隔，例如伽马射线海市蜃楼。这些海市蜃楼可以帮助限制星际磁场的特性。 [物理。 Rev. D 112, 123017] 2025 年 12 月 5 日星期五发布
authors: Yiwei Bao, Ruo-Yu Liu, Gwenael Giacinti, Hai-Ming Zhang, and Yang Chen

articles.title: Strain gradient engineered flexophotovoltaics and spin polarization in bent ${\mathrm{MoSi}}_{2}{\mathrm{N}}_{4}$ nanoribbons
articles.title_zh: 弯曲 ${\mathrm{MoSi}}_{2}{\mathrm{N}}_{4}$ 纳米带中的应变梯度工程柔性光伏和自旋极化
articles.abstract: Author(s): Helong Chen, Meng Ge, Yang Xiao, Degao Xu, Jianing Tan, and Gang Ouyang The authors demonstrate here that strain-gradient engineering in bent MoSi 2 N 4 nanoribbons induces not only self-doping and a nonzero Berry curvature dipole, but also achieves an outstanding flexoelectric power conversion efficiency of 9.05%, the highest among 2D flexophotovoltaic systems. Under circularly polarized light, the bent MoSi 2 N 4 photodetector generates a self-powered spin photocurrent. These results advance the fundamental understanding of mechanical-electronic coupling in 2D materials and highlight the potential of MoSi 2 N 4 for high-efficiency solar cells, optoelectronics, and spintronic applications. [Phys. Rev. B 112, 245407] Published Fri Dec 05, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Helong Chen、Meng Ge、Yang Shaw、Degao Xu、Jianing Tan 和 Gang Ouyang 作者在此证明，弯曲 MoSi 2 N 4 纳米带中的应变梯度工程不仅会产生自掺杂和非零贝里曲率偶极子，而且还实现了 9.05% 的出色挠曲电功率转换效率，这是二维柔性光伏系统中最高的。在圆偏振光下，弯曲的MoSi 2 N 4 光电探测器产生自供电的自旋光电流。这些结果增进了对二维材料中机电耦合的基本理解，并凸显了 MoSi 2 N 4 在高效太阳能电池、光电子学和自旋电子学应用中的潜力。 [物理。 Rev. B 112, 245407] 2025 年 12 月 5 日星期五发布
authors: Helong Chen, Meng Ge, Yang Xiao, Degao Xu, Jianing Tan, and Gang Ouyang

articles.title: Short-range spin freezing in the double trillium lattice spin-liquid candidate ${\mathrm{KSrFe}}_{2}{({\mathrm{PO}}_{4})}_{3}$ revealed via $^{31}\mathrm{P}$ NMR
articles.title_zh: 通过$^{31}\mathrm{P}$ NMR揭示双延龄晶格自旋液体候选物${\mathrm{KSrFe}}_{2}{({\mathrm{PO}}_{4})}_{3}$中的短程自旋冻结
articles.abstract: Author(s): Sebin J. Sebastian, Q.-P. Ding, A. A. Tsirlin, R. Nath, and Y. Furukawa The authors investigate here the double-trillium lattice antiferromagnet KSrFe 2 (PO 4 ) 3 using 31 P NMR, thermodynamic measurements, and first-principles calculations to elucidate its unconventional ground state. Below the characteristic temperature T * ~ 3.5 K, the results reveal a short-range spin freezing state with persistent antiferromagnetic fluctuations, contradicting earlier proposals of a gapless spin-liquid state. A nearly field-independent NMR linewidth, strong enhancement of 1/ T 2 below T *, and sizeable antiferromagnetic exchange interactions collectively position KSrFe 2 (PO 4 ) 3 as a rare three-dimensional frustrated magnet hosting intertwined static and dynamic correlations. [Phys. Rev. B 112, L220406] Published Fri Dec 05, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Sebin J. Sebastian, Q.-P。 Ding、A. A. Tsirlin、R. Nath 和 Y. Furukawa 作者利用 31 P NMR、热力学测量和第一性原理计算研究了双延龄晶格反铁磁体 KSrFe 2 (PO 4 ) 3 ，以阐明其非常规基态。在特征温度 T * ~ 3.5 K 以下，结果揭示了具有持续反铁磁涨落的短程自旋冻结态，这与早期提出的无间隙自旋液体态相矛盾。几乎与场无关的 NMR 线宽、低于 T * 的 1/ T 2 的强烈增强以及相当大的反铁磁交换相互作用共同将 KSrFe 2 (PO 4 ) 3 定位为一种罕见的三维受挫磁体，具有相互交织的静态和动态相关性。 [物理。修订版 B 112，L220406] 2025 年 12 月 5 日星期五发布
authors: Sebin J. Sebastian, Q.-P. Ding, A. A. Tsirlin, R. Nath, and Y. Furukawa

articles.abstract: Nature Reviews Materials, Published online: 05 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s41578-025-00866-3 Organic thermoelectric materials are transitioning from laboratory prototypes towards practical devices and could potentially surpass the performance of their inorganic counterparts near room temperature. Research priorities include probing the thermoelectric conversion limit of soft materials, designing organic thermoelectrics for precise temperature control and exploring applications beyond conventional power generation.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然评论材料》，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 5 日； doi:10.1038/s41578-025-00866-3 有机热电材料正在从实验室原型过渡到实用设备，并且有可能在接近室温时超越无机材料的性能。研究重点包括探索软材料的热电转换极限、设计用于精确温度控制的有机热电材料以及探索传统发电之外的应用。

articles.title: Dynamics of Surface Processes: Impact of Adiabatic and Nonadiabatic Energy Dissipation
articles.title_zh: 表面过程动力学：绝热和非绝热能量耗散的影响
articles.abstract: Dynamics of molecular interactions with solid surfaces, such as scattering, adsorption/desorption, diffusion, and reaction, are affected by energy dissipation at surfaces. Recent progress in experimental studies of surface dynamics has stimulated intense interest in theoretical investigation of microscopic mechanisms and pathways of energy transfer. This review summarizes recent developments in modeling such processes, emphasizing new understandings of electronically adiabatic and nonadiabatic energy dissipation mechanisms and dynamics in representative systems, using various theoretical methods. In particular, machine learning has been leveraged to represent high-dimensional adiabatic potential energy surfaces, electronic friction tensors, and effective multielectron diabatic Hamiltonians. When integrated with mixed quantum-classical dynamics methods, such as molecular dynamics with electronic friction and independent electron surface hopping, these first-principles-based simulations provided unprecedented insights into the roles played by adiabatic and nonadiabatic energy dissipation channels in surface dynamics and in-depth interpretation of experimental observations.
articles.abstract_zh: 分子与固体表面相互作用的动力学，例如散射、吸附/解吸、扩散和反应，受到表面能量耗散的影响。表面动力学实验研究的最新进展激发了人们对能量转移微观机制和途径的理论研究的浓厚兴趣。本综述总结了此类过程建模的最新进展，强调使用各种理论方法对代表性系统中的电子绝热和非绝热能量耗散机制和动力学的新理解。特别是，机器学习已被用来表示高维绝热势能面、电子摩擦张量和有效的多电子非绝热哈密顿量。当与混合量子经典动力学方法（例如具有电子摩擦和独立电子表面跳跃的分子动力学）相结合时，这些基于第一原理的模拟为绝热和非绝热能量耗散通道在表面动力学中所扮演的角色提供了前所未有的见解，并对实验观察进行了深入解释。
authors: Gang Meng, Yaolong Zhang, Bin Jiang and Hua Guo

articles.title_zh: ${\mathrm{La}}_{0.7}{\mathrm{Sr}}_{0.3}\mathrm{Mn}{\mathrm{O}}_{3}/\mathrm{SrIr}{\mathrm{O}}_{3}$双层中的界面磁性和反常霍尔效应
articles.abstract: Author(s): Andrea Peralta-Somoza, Myoung Woo-Yoo, Sandra Lopez, Rafael Fuster, Mariona Cabero, José María Gonzalez-Calbet, Javier Tornos, Alberto Rivera, Federico Mompeán, Mar García-Hernández, Timothy R. Charlton, Brian J. Kirby, Stephan Rosenkranz, Daniel Haskel, Yongseong Choi, Joerg Strempfer, Xiao Wang, Zouhair Sefrioui, Carlos León, Javier E. Villegas, Suzanne G. E. te Velthuis, and Jacobo Santamaría The authors reveal a magnetic proximity effect in La 0 . 7 Sr 0 . 3 MnO 3 (LSMO)/SrIrO 3 (SIO) heterostructures arising from an interfacial reconstruction. When LSMO caps SIO, LSMO retains interfacial ferromagnetism, polarizing the iridate and producing an emergent, intrinsic AHE. Reversing the stack (SIO/LSMO) suppresses interfacial LSMO magnetism; the proximity effect and AHE vanish. These results identify interface-engineered chemistry and bonding as the lever controlling proximity magnetism and topological AHE at a 3d/5d oxide interface, highlighting a tunable interplay of topology and correlations with prospects for topological spintronics and spin-orbitronic devices. [Phys. Rev. Materials 9, 124402] Published Thu Dec 04, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Andrea Peralta-Somoza、Myoung Woo-Yoo、Sandra Lopez、Rafael Fuster、Mariona Cabero、José María Gonzalez-Calbet、Javier Tornos、Alberto Rivera、Federico Mompeán、Mar García-Hernández、Timothy R. articles.title: Depletion region width of a ferroelectric heterostructure interface by surface potential measurements under illumination
articles.title_zh: 通过照明下的表面电位测量来测量铁电异质结构界面的耗尽区宽度
articles.abstract: Author(s): A. Bagard, C. Hu, X. Henning, T. Fix, M. Lenertz, A. Dinia, S. Colis, and M. V. Rastei A method for measuring the depletion region width at oxide heterostructure interfaces is developed. It is demonstrated on bismuth ferrite–chromite thin films that exhibit p-type behavior and form a p–n-like junction when grown on a Nb-doped strontium titanate substrate. Using surface photovoltage measurements with Kelvin probe force microscopy under illumination on films of different thicknesses, a maximum SPV response is identified, revealing the depletion region width. This width also enables estimation of the acceptor concentration in the film, providing a non-destructive approach to probing ferroelectric heterostructures. [Phys. Rev. Materials 9, 123801] Published Mon Dec 01, 2025
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：A. Bagard、C. Hu、X. Henning、T. Fix、M. Lenertz、A. Dinia、S. Colis 和 M. V. Rastei 开发了一种测量氧化物异质结构界面处耗尽区宽度的方法。它在铁氧体-亚铬酸铋薄膜上得到了证明，当在掺铌钛酸锶基板上生长时，铁氧体-亚铬酸铋薄膜表现出 p 型行为并形成 p-n 状结。使用开尔文探针力显微镜在照明下对不同厚度的薄膜进行表面光电压测量，确定了最大 SPV 响应，揭示了耗尽区宽度。该宽度还可以估计薄膜中的受体浓度，从而提供一种非破坏性的方法来探测铁电异质结构。 [物理。修订版材料 9, 123801] 于 2025 年 12 月 1 日星期一发布
